crates.name: sovereign-agent-loop
crates.description: A ReAct-style agent control loop: generate a response, and if it contains a tool call dispatch it and feed the observation back, repeating until a final answer or a step cap. Generic over a Responder (any text generator) and driven by a ToolRegistry. The control structure that turns a language model plus tools into an agent. Composes sovereign-tool-dispatch.

crates.name: sovereign-agent-runtime
crates.description: Bridges the real LLM runtime into the agent loop: an LlmResponder that drives sovereign-agent-loop with sovereign-llm, so a tool-using ReAct agent runs on the actual quantized inference engine instead of a scripted responder. The wiring that turns the inference stack and the agentic layer into one running agent. Composes sovereign-agent-loop and sovereign-llm.

crates.name: sovereign-aho-corasick
crates.description: Aho-Corasick multi-pattern string matching: build a trie of all patterns, add BFS failure links, then scan any text once to find every occurrence of every pattern in O(text + matches) — instead of running one search per pattern. For scanning generations against many banned phrases, stop sequences, or injection markers simultaneously.

crates.name: sovereign-aimd-limiter
crates.description: Adaptive concurrency limiter using AIMD (additive-increase / multiplicative-decrease), the TCP congestion-control law applied to in-flight requests: the limit grows by a fixed step while the system is healthy and saturated, and is cut by a multiplicative factor on overload (a timeout, a drop, or a latency breach), converging on the real capacity without a hand-tuned constant. For backpressure in front of a model server — distinct from a fixed-rate token bucket and from a circuit breaker.

crates.name: sovereign-alias-sampler
crates.description: Walker-Vose alias method for O(1) categorical sampling: preprocess a weighted distribution in O(n) into a probability/alias table, then draw each sample in constant time with one coin flip — far faster than a linear CDF scan when you sample the same distribution many times. Seeded for deterministic, reproducible draws.

crates.name: sovereign-answer-extract
crates.description: Final-answer extraction from chain-of-thought output: pulls the answer out of a model's reasoning by honoring 'Answer:'/'Final answer:'/'the answer is' markers (falling back to the last line), and extracts the last numeric value for math tasks. The step between reasoning and a usable answer — pairs with self-consistency voting.

crates.name: sovereign-arg-schema
crates.description: Lightweight argument schemas for tool calls: declare a tool's required and optional fields with their JSON types and validate an extracted argument object against them, collecting every violation. The typing layer between json-extract and tool-dispatch that turns a model's free-form JSON into checked, structured tool arguments.

crates.name: sovereign-attention
crates.description: Numerically-stable scaled-dot-product attention engine: the naive full-softmax kernel plus the online-softmax (FlashAttention) recurrence that computes the identical result in one streaming pass without ever materializing the score row, and an incremental decode-time accumulator that attends a query against a growing KV cache one token at a time.

crates.name: sovereign-balanced-constrain
crates.description: Incremental balanced-delimiter constraint for constrained decoding: a pushdown automaton that tracks open brackets and string state so generation can only emit characters that keep parentheses, brackets, braces, and quotes balanced. A context-free constraint (the Dyck language) — stronger than a regular-expression mask for nested structures like JSON or code.

crates.name: sovereign-bandit
crates.description: Multi-armed bandit selection: epsilon-greedy, UCB1, and Thompson sampling over arms with online reward updates, for learning which model, prompt, or strategy performs best while still exploring. Seeded and deterministic — the adaptive-routing core for a system that improves with use.

crates.name: sovereign-base-os
crates.description: E0459 / M00800 — Base OS module: the 10 responsibilities (kernel / firmware / NVIDIA drivers / AppArmor / cgroup-v2 / systemd / ZFS / LUKS / networking / VFIO-IOMMU) and the 5 config modes (stable / ai-driver-latest / secure / developer / offline).

crates.name: sovereign-beam-search
crates.description: Beam-search decoding: the deterministic, search-based alternative to stochastic sampling — keeps the top-B partial hypotheses by cumulative log-probability, forking each decoder's KV state to extend them, and returns the highest-scoring sequence. Composes sovereign-decoder-stack (its Clone-able model is what lets a beam fork).

crates.name: sovereign-best-of-n
crates.description: Inference-time scaling by sampling N candidates and picking a winner: best-of-N by a score (logprob or reward), top-k selection, and weighted self-consistency that sums each distinct answer's candidate scores and takes the highest. The aggregation layer for spending more compute at decode time to get a better answer.

crates.name: sovereign-bin-packing
crates.description: One-dimensional bin packing: fit variable-size items into the fewest fixed-capacity bins by next-fit, first-fit, best-fit, or the decreasing (sorted-largest-first) heuristics, with a lower bound to gauge how close a packing is to optimal. For batching sequences into a KV-cache memory budget, placing jobs onto fixed-size workers, and any fit-as-much-as-you-can allocation.

crates.name: sovereign-binary-quant
crates.description: Binary (1-bit) embedding quantization: replace each float component with its sign packed into u64 words, shrinking an embedding 32x, and compare with Hamming distance (a fast proxy for cosine after centering). For memory-frugal billion-scale vector search with a full-precision rerank step. Distinct from codebook (PQ) and scalar quantization.

crates.name: sovereign-bit-cheats
crates.description: M008 bit-level cheats — the policy/logic half (the SIMD half lives in sovereign-simd::cheats). Bitfields-as-microcode (M00113 — the control word as executable policy), two-level rule tables (M00119), the branch-prediction analogy (M00121), and the three-representation layout (M00126 — hot numeric / hot bitfield / cold text). Safe — forbids unsafe.

crates.name: sovereign-bitlinear-core
crates.description: M073 BitLinear ternary core — BitNet b1.58 {-1,0,+1} absmean quantization, information-theoretic-limit bit-packing (5 trits/byte ≈ 1.6 bits/param), and multiplication-free ternary GEMM (mul → conditional add/sub). Pure-Rust CPU reference; no de-quantization at execution. Targets the Pulse Core (M070 CCD 0) AVX-512 path (M067).

crates.name: sovereign-bitops
crates.description: M008 bit-level cheats — portable references for the AVX-512 bit ops the dump exploits: VPTERNLOG (arbitrary 3-input boolean via 8-bit LUT), VPOPCNTDQ (popcount), VPCOMPRESS (mask-gather), VP2INTERSECT (set intersection masks). Numerics match the hardware instructions.

crates.name: sovereign-bktree
crates.description: A BK-tree for fuzzy string lookup: a metric tree over Levenshtein distance that finds all terms within an edit radius of a query while pruning most of the dictionary via the triangle inequality — so spell-correction and 'did you mean' stay fast as the vocabulary grows, instead of scanning every term. Composes sovereign-edit-distance.

crates.name: sovereign-bloom
crates.description: A Bloom filter for cheap probabilistic set membership: tells you an item is definitely-absent or probably-present in constant space, with a tunable false-positive rate and no false negatives. For deduplicating prompts/documents/seen-IDs without storing them all. Optimal sizing from expected item count and target FP rate; deterministic FNV double-hashing.

crates.name: sovereign-bm25
crates.description: BM25 (Okapi) lexical ranking: scores documents for a query with inverse-document-frequency weighting, saturating term frequency (k1), and document-length normalization (b) — the standard probabilistic retrieval function. A stronger ranker than raw term overlap for grounding retrieval.

crates.name: sovereign-bounded-block
crates.description: A bounded-memory decoder block: the same precision-selectable pre-norm structure as quant-block, but its KV cache is a sliding window with attention sinks, so it runs for an unbounded number of steps in O(1) memory. The block for endless operation. While within the window it reproduces the unbounded quant-block exactly. Composes sovereign-linear, sovereign-rmsnorm, sovereign-rope, sovereign-attention, sovereign-ffn, and sovereign-kv-window.

crates.name: sovereign-bpe-train
crates.description: Byte-pair-encoding training: learns merge rules from a corpus by iteratively fusing the most frequent adjacent symbol pair, producing a ready-to-use byte-level tokenizer. The training counterpart to sovereign-tokenizer (which only applies merges). Composes sovereign-tokenizer.

crates.name: sovereign-branch-scheduler
crates.description: M007 execution model — the 8-step branch loop (Spawn/Retrieve/Draft/Filter/Verify/Act/Commit/Learn) over a SoA batch of 8 branches, gated by M002 control-word permissions (M00104) and driven by the M008 AVX-512 cheats (VPTERNLOG fuse-policy, speculative-accept short-circuit, VPCOMPRESS survivor-pack). The capstone that ties M002 + M007 + M008 into one tick. Forbids unsafe — wraps the safe sovereign-simd + control-word APIs.

crates.name: sovereign-branch-tree
crates.description: M007 branch primitive — the fork/join execution unit of the deterministic runtime: a branch tree you fork, commit, or prune (cascading to descendants), with lineage + active-set queries. The structure the value plane scores and the control word annotates.

crates.name: sovereign-calc
crates.description: A safe arithmetic expression evaluator: a dependency-free recursive-descent parser for +, -, *, /, parentheses, unary minus, and decimals, with correct precedence and typed errors. The real calculator tool an agent calls instead of trusting a language model to do arithmetic.

crates.name: sovereign-cfg-grammar
crates.description: Context-free grammar recognizer with an incremental Earley parser, computing the set of terminals allowed to come next after any prefix. The engine behind grammar-constrained decoding (GBNF-style guided generation): unlike a regular-expression matcher it handles nested and recursive structure — balanced brackets, JSON, expression grammars — so a generator can be masked to only-valid continuations token by token.

crates.name: sovereign-cgroup-systemd
crates.description: M045 cgroup v2 + systemd lifecycle surface per E0428 + M00747-M00750 dump 13564-13594. 8 OS primitives + cgroup v2 resource control + systemd service-boundaries-slices-scopes lifecycle. The 'peace-machine substrate' per dump 13594 verbatim.

crates.name: sovereign-chat
crates.description: Multi-turn conversation management over the LLM runtime: tracks a role-tagged message history, renders it into a prompt, generates a reply, and appends it — with bounded history (keep the system message + the most recent turns) for endless dialogue. The chat layer above raw completion. Composes sovereign-llm.

crates.name: sovereign-chat-template
crates.description: Chat templating across model formats: render a list of system/user/assistant messages into the exact prompt string a given model expects — ChatML (<|im_start|>), Llama-2 ([INST]/<<SYS>>), Alpaca (### Instruction), or a custom per-role spec — with an optional generation prompt suffix. The apply_chat_template step for the inference engine.

crates.name: sovereign-checkpoint
crates.description: Model checkpoint persistence: serializes a full LlmConfig (tokenizer + model weights) into a versioned, FNV-checksummed container and loads it back with magic/version/integrity validation, so a sovereign runtime can save and restore a model and detect corruption. Composes sovereign-llm.

crates.name: sovereign-choice-envelope
crates.description: M042 9-axis choice envelope per R07096-R07104 + M00709 dump 12384-12395. Each axis is a sovereignty boundary the operator can override. Doctrine: 'That is sovereignty' (R07105 dump 12395).

crates.name: sovereign-chromofold
crates.description: The safe Rust surface for the ChromoFold GPU-resident, searchable compressed-domain engine (SDD-400). Forbids `unsafe` (all FFI is quarantined in `sovereign-chromofold-sys`); reports honest-degrade availability when the engine is not linked, exposes the capability descriptor (the source-of-truth for the honest-degrade UI, SDD-300 pattern), and holds the FM-index `count`/`locate`/`predict` surface as ABI-pending stubs until the native session freezes their stable C ABI (Lane A).

crates.name: sovereign-chromofold-sys
crates.description: The sanctioned-unsafe FFI carve-out over the ChromoFold native engine's stable C ABI (`chromofold.h`, ABI v0 / M1: packed-wavelet access + rank + fused embedding-gather). Mirrors the committed C header 1:1; the actual link to `libchromofold` is behind the OFF-by-default `linked` feature, so a box with no engine present compiles a pure stub and behaves exactly as today. `unsafe` is confined HERE (SDD-400) — the safe wrapper is `sovereign-chromofold`.

crates.name: sovereign-chunker
crates.description: Sentence-aware text chunking for RAG ingestion: splits a document into overlapping chunks near a target size, breaking at sentence boundaries rather than mid-sentence, with a configurable overlap so context isn't lost at the seams. The ingestion step that prepares documents for the retriever and embedder.

crates.name: sovereign-circuit-breaker
crates.description: A circuit breaker for failing downstreams: after N consecutive failures it opens (rejecting calls fast instead of hammering a dead service), after a cooldown it goes half-open to let one trial through, and a success closes it again. Time is injected for deterministic testing. Complements retry — retry rides out a blip, the breaker gives up on a persistent outage.

crates.name: sovereign-classification-metrics
crates.description: Classification evaluation metrics: a confusion matrix with accuracy, per-class precision/recall/F1 and macro/micro/weighted averages, Cohen's kappa, plus binary ROC-AUC by the rank (Mann-Whitney) method. For evaluating classifiers and routers such as the complexity router and intent detection.

crates.name: sovereign-coat
crates.description: CoAT — Chain-of-Associated-Thoughts: iterative MCTS deliberation over the M007 branch tree, where every expansion recalls associative memory that modulates a thought's value. One engine that IS the whole reasoning ladder — CoT (branch=1) -> ToT (branch>1) -> MCTS (UCT select/expand/simulate/backprop) -> C-MCTS (bounded action categories) -> CoAT (memory recall). Generic over a thought source + an associative memory, so the search harness is deterministic and testable without a model.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-accent-color-policy
crates.description: Operator-chosen accent color with hex parsing and luminance check.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-accordion
crates.description: Cockpit accordion (collapsible-panel group) state. Ordered sections with title, expanded flag, and an optional single-open invariant so only one section may be open at a time. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-achievement-toast
crates.description: Earned-achievement transient toast queue.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-action-bar
crates.description: Cockpit bottom action-bar state. Holds primary, secondary, and tertiary action slots, each with label + enabled flag + danger flag. Ordering: primary right, secondary left, tertiary inline; clear() / set() mutators. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-action-discoverability
crates.description: Per-action usage tracking — surface unused/discoverable actions to the operator.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-action-menu
crates.description: Cockpit hierarchical action menu state. Tree of MenuNode (Item / SubMenu / Separator) with disabled per-item flag; visible() filters out items hidden by per-node visible_if predicate. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-action-search-bar
crates.description: Action search bar with name/keyword/category search and recent-usage boost.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-action-throttle
crates.description: Cockpit per-action throttle — minimum spacing (milliseconds) between repeats of operator-issued actions (mode switch / tool invocation / replay step). Token-bucket-equivalent that refuses an action if the previous one fired too recently.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-action-trigger-button
crates.description: Action button with transient pending/success/failed states and auto-reset.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-activity-feed
crates.description: Bounded timestamped activity feed with category filter and unread tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-agenda-view
crates.description: Agenda view of timestamped items grouped by day boundary.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-alert-acknowledge
crates.description: Per-alert acknowledgment state with operator + ts.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-alert-group
crates.description: Alert grouping by tag with severity + count rollup.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-alert-tile-board
crates.description: Fixed-shape alert tile board with severity sort + sticky pinned tiles.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-alpha-index
crates.description: A-Z alphabetic index bar with first-occurrence offsets.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-aria-live-router
crates.description: Cockpit ARIA-live-region router. Classifies cockpit messages by Severity and routes each into the polite or assertive live-region buffer, with a per-region dedup window so screen-readers do not re-announce identical messages within N ms. Pure UX-presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-aspect-ratio-box
crates.description: Fixed aspect-ratio box geometry within a container.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-attachment-tray
crates.description: Per-draft attachment tray with size + count limits.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-attention-cue
crates.description: Attention pulse on UI elements with decay + acknowledge.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-audit-trail
crates.description: Bounded audit trail — (actor, action, target, ts_ms) records.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-auto-link
crates.description: Detects http/https URL substrings in plain text and segments them as links.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-autocomplete-list
crates.description: Cockpit autocomplete-list state. Holds (suggestions, highlight_index). update(query, ranked_pairs) replaces the list; arrow_down/arrow_up move the highlight with wrap; accept() returns the highlighted suggestion. Pure descriptor; the ranker lives elsewhere (sovereign-cockpit-fuzzy-ranker).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-avatar-stack
crates.description: Overlapping avatar stack with +N overflow indicator.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-banner-bus
crates.description: Cockpit single-slot banner bus. Holds at most one banner; higher-priority post replaces lower-priority. dismiss(id) clears only if the dismissed id is currently showing; lower-prio queued banners can be inspected via queued(). Pure descriptor; distinct from banner-state (in-place banner) and toast-tray (multi-toast).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-banner-state
crates.description: Cockpit banner state — the always-visible top bar carrying (active ExecutionMode, active BundleName, hottest HardwareTarget thermal verdict, open alert count). The cockpit renders this on every page; the daemon updates it on every state change. Single source of truth for the operator's quick-glance signal.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-battery-indicator
crates.description: Cockpit battery indicator. Tracks pct + charge state (Charging / Discharging / Full / Unknown) + low/critical thresholds + naive time-remaining estimate from the last sample delta. Pure UX-presentation crate; does not touch power management.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-bottom-sheet
crates.description: Cockpit bottom-sheet state with three snap heights (Collapsed / Half / Full). set_snap; drag_to(px) clamps + snaps to the nearest of {collapsed_px, half_px, full_px} per snap_threshold_px; current_height() reports the resolved px. Pure layout math.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-breadcrumb-trail
crates.description: Cockpit breadcrumb-trail state. Tracks the operator's navigation path (root → section → page → subpage…) with truncation to keep the bar visually compact when the path grows long. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-breakpoint-state
crates.description: Responsive breakpoint state — viewport width → XS/SM/MD/LG/XL.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-bulk-action
crates.description: Cockpit bulk-action toolbar state. Given a selected-id set and a list of registered actions (with required-min/required-max selection counts and per-action `disable_if_all_locked` rule), reports which actions are currently enabled. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-bulk-selection
crates.description: Multi-item selection with anchor + shift-range support.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-byte-size-formatter
crates.description: Byte size formatter — bytes → human string with SI or IEC units.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-calendar-grid
crates.description: Month-grid cells with day-of-month + current-month flag.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-callout-arrow
crates.description: Directional callout arrow placement (Side + offset along edge).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-card-grid
crates.description: Cockpit responsive card-grid layout. Given (container_w, min_card_w, max_card_w, gap_px), compute columns + actual_card_w that fits without horizontal scroll. Pure UX math.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-carousel
crates.description: Cockpit horizontal carousel state. Tracks N slides + current index + optional auto-advance interval. next()/prev() wrap or clamp per `wrap_around` flag. tick(now_ms) advances when the auto-interval elapses (only after `enable_autoplay`). Pure presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cascading-select
crates.description: Dependent dropdowns — child options depend on parent selection.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-celebration
crates.description: Cockpit milestone-celebration emitter. fire(scope_id, milestone_id, ts) records a brief celebration event; should_show(scope_id, milestone_id) returns Some when an unshowed celebration exists; mark_shown clears. Each (scope, milestone) tuple fires at most once per session. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cell-editor
crates.description: Cockpit inline cell-editor state. Tracks a single editable (row, col) coordinate, the in-progress buffer, dirty flag, and per-cell validation_error. commit/cancel return TransactionOutcome. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cell-format
crates.description: Cockpit table-cell formatter. Per CellKind (Plain/Number/Pct/CurrencyMinor/BytesIec/DurationMs) returns the rendered string. Numeric kinds clamp at i64. Pure formatter; distinct from sovereign-cockpit-number-format (top-level) — this is the cell-by-column-kind dispatcher.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cell-range-select
crates.description: Spreadsheet cell-range selection — anchor + focus rectangle.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-changelog-pane
crates.description: Versioned changelog entries with per-entry read state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-chart-legend
crates.description: Cockpit chart-legend state. Each Series{id, label, color, visible}; toggle(id), solo(id) shows only that series and hides the rest, show_all(). hovered(id) tracks hover-highlight. Pure descriptor; chart renderer reads visibility + hover.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cheatsheet-builder
crates.description: Cockpit keyboard-cheatsheet builder. Takes a list of registered (action, chord, group) entries and produces a category-grouped, stable-ordered renderable cheatsheet for the operator help overlay. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-checkbox-tree
crates.description: Cockpit tri-state checkbox-tree state. Hierarchical nodes with three checkbox states: Checked / Unchecked / Indeterminate. Toggling a parent propagates down (Checked/Unchecked); a parent's state is derived from its children's aggregate (all-checked / all-unchecked / mixed = Indeterminate). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-checklist
crates.description: Cockpit ordered checklist of operator-facing items (e.g. onboarding setup, end-of-task review). Each Item{id, label, completed_at}. complete(id, ts)/uncomplete(id); progress() returns (done, total) and percent. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-clipboard-buffer
crates.description: Cockpit in-engine clipboard ring buffer. Capped FIFO of recent copies (text, image-ref) with size limit and per-entry timestamp. paste(index) returns the n-th most recent. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-clipboard-history
crates.description: Cockpit clipboard history — bounded FIFO of recent operator-copied snippets (text / link / trace_id / command-output). Capacity 100. Each entry carries a kind tag + copied-at timestamp. Pure UX surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-clock-display
crates.description: Cockpit clock display preferences — 12h vs 24h, seconds visibility, weekday visibility, monospace digits toggle. Pure UX with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-coachmark-tour
crates.description: Guided coachmark tour with step pointer and completion tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-code-block-actions
crates.description: Per-code-block UI action set: copy, wrap, expand, run.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-code-fold
crates.description: Code-fold regions by line range with fold/unfold toggling.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-code-gutter
crates.description: Cockpit code editor gutter. Tracks per-line annotations (breakpoint, warning, error, info, diff added/removed/modified) and the gutter width required to show the line number plus a single annotation glyph. Pure descriptor; the renderer draws.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-code-lang-guess
crates.description: Cockpit code-language heuristic guesser. guess(filename, first_line) returns a Language label by checking, in order: filename extension, shebang on first_line, content sniff. Pure heuristic; pairs with a syntax-highlighting renderer.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-collapsible-region
crates.description: Cockpit collapsible region state. Holds (id, expanded, prefer_expanded_when_filled, content_height_px). 'prefer expanded when filled' auto-expands when content is non-empty. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-collapsible-section
crates.description: Cockpit collapsible section state — per-section_id collapsed/expanded boolean persistence. The cockpit restores the operator's choices across reloads. Pure UX.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-color-blind-mode
crates.description: Cockpit color-blind accessibility mode — 4 modes (None / Protanopia / Deuteranopia / Tritanopia). Each remaps the cockpit's default palette to use color combinations safe for the target vision. Pure UX accessibility surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-color-contrast
crates.description: WCAG-2.1 §1.4.3 relative-luminance + contrast-ratio computation for cockpit color pair validation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-color-mode
crates.description: Cockpit color-mode resolver. Tracks user_preference (Light/Dark/Auto), the system signal (LightSystem/DarkSystem/Unknown), and an optional override per app-context. effective() resolves the three into the rendered color mode (Light or Dark). Pure preference resolver.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-color-picker
crates.description: Cockpit color-picker widget state. Holds an RGBA-8 swatch + an optional named palette of recent + favorite colors. set_hex parses #RGB/#RRGGBB/#RRGGBBAA. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-color-swatch
crates.description: Cockpit color-swatch grid. Maintains ordered named (name, hex) swatches plus a selected_index. add/insert/remove/select keep the grid in sync. Pure descriptor; distinct from sovereign-cockpit-theme-palette (cockpit theme tokens) and sovereign-cockpit-color-picker (continuous picker).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-column-config
crates.description: Cockpit table-column configuration. Ordered column list with (id, label, visible, width_px, pinned_left, pinned_right). reorder/resize/toggle_visible. visible_in_render_order returns rendered list with pinned columns first/last regardless of base order. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-column-filter
crates.description: Per-column filter expressions (Contains/Equals/Range) with AND combine.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-column-pin
crates.description: Cockpit table-column pinning. Each column is pinned Left / Right / None and ordered within its side. pin(id, side); unpin; ordered_by_side returns the visual order. Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-column-config (visibility/sizing) — this is the pinning lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-column-resize
crates.description: Table column width state with min/max clamping and live drag deltas.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-column-visibility
crates.description: Per-column visibility with required-cannot-hide enforcement.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-combobox-state
crates.description: Combobox UI state: open/closed, highlighted item, search filter, accepted value.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-command-palette
crates.description: Cockpit command palette catalog — operator-callable commands surfaced via Ctrl-K style overlay. Each command declares (id, label, group, mode_gate, action_id). Composes sovereign-execution-mode-registry for gating + sovereign-cockpit-keystroke-map for binding lookup.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-comment-thread
crates.description: Cockpit comment thread state. Comment{id, author, body, posted_at, in_reply_to, resolved}. add (validates parent exists, no cycles); resolve(id) marks; outline(target_id) returns the tree-ordered list with reply nesting. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-confirmation-modal
crates.description: Cockpit confirmation modal — operator-facing yes/no dialog state with optional 'type to confirm' phrase + countdown. Pure UX gate; actual destructive operations are still gated by IPS-side authority crates.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-connectivity-state
crates.description: Connectivity state — Online / Degraded / Reconnecting / Offline.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-consent-prompt
crates.description: Multi-stage user-consent prompt state machine.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-context-help
crates.description: Anchor-keyed inline help tooltips.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-context-menu
crates.description: Cockpit right-click context menu — per-target-kind menu definitions with items, separators, and submenus. Pure UX state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-context-panel
crates.description: Cockpit sidebar context panel — composite that gathers (active conversation, active bundle, active mode, active workspace folder, current branch_id) into one signed envelope the sidebar renders. Refreshes on every cockpit state change.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cooldown-meter
crates.description: Cooldown meter — gates an action for a fixed duration after each fire.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cost-meter
crates.description: Budget gauge with Normal/Warning/Critical/Exceeded thresholds.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-countdown-timer
crates.description: Countdown timer state machine: idle/running/paused/finished.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-cpu-meter
crates.description: Cockpit CPU/load meter. Bounded ring of per-sample load values; emits Series for sparkline + current value + smoothed average. Color tier based on smoothed % (Green/Yellow/Red). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-currency-formatter
crates.description: Currency amount formatter with symbol + decimals + grouping per spec.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-dashboard-grid
crates.description: Cockpit dashboard widget-grid state. Bounded N×M cell grid; widgets occupy a rectangle (x, y, w, h). place rejects placement that goes off-grid or overlaps another widget. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-dashboard-profile
crates.description: Cockpit dashboard preset profiles (Operator / Engineer / Security / Trader / Custom). Each preset enables a specific widget allowlist and a default layout id. activate(id) swaps the active preset; widget_enabled(widget_id) reports if it's in the active set. Pairs with sovereign-cockpit-widget-registry.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-data-grid-sort
crates.description: Cockpit data-grid sort state. Ordered multi-column sort spec (column_id × direction). click_column tri-state cycles None → Asc → Desc → None when the same column is clicked, or replaces single-column sort when a new column is clicked. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-date-range-picker
crates.description: Date range picker with from/to bounds and named quick-presets.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-day-divider
crates.description: Groups timestamps into Today/Yesterday/EarlierThisWeek/Older buckets.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-day-schedule
crates.description: Single-day time-block schedule with conflict detection.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-deep-link-codec
crates.description: Encode/decode cockpit state to/from URL deep-link fragments.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-delta-pill
crates.description: Colored delta pill (signed change vs prior, classified into Up/Flat/Down).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-density-mode
crates.description: Cockpit UI density preference — operator picks Compact / Comfortable / Spacious / Touch density, the cockpit renders rows/widgets/typography at the picked spacing. Pure visual UX with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-destructive-confirm
crates.description: Cockpit type-to-confirm gate for destructive actions. Operator types the required phrase (case-sensitive); typed(now) tracks progress and can_proceed() returns true only when the phrase matches exactly AND a configurable hold_ms has elapsed since opening. Distinct from confirmation-modal (yes/no) — this is the safety-gated 'type DELETE to confirm' lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-detail-panel
crates.description: Cockpit right-side detail panel — operator-toggleable inspector for the currently-selected item (turn / dashboard widget / replay step / bookmark / pin / notification / share-link / tab). Tracks (subject_kind, subject_id, width_px, collapsed). Pure UX state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-dictation-state
crates.description: Voice dictation session state machine.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-did-you-mean
crates.description: Did-you-mean suggester — char-overlap scoring with top-N.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-diff-stats
crates.description: Per-file diff stats with grand-total roll-up.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-dirty-fields
crates.description: Track form fields modified from initial values.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-disk-meter
crates.description: Cockpit disk-usage gauge per mountpoint. Tracks N mountpoints each with (used_bytes, total_bytes). emits per-mount zone + render_display + an overall_worst_zone aggregator. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-dnd-target
crates.description: Cockpit drag-and-drop target registry (the receptor side; sovereign-cockpit-drag-drop is the source side). Each Target declares accepted ObjectKinds + an active flag. dispatch_drop(source_kind, target_id) returns Accepted / RejectedKind / Unknown.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-do-not-disturb
crates.description: Do-Not-Disturb mode with manual + scheduled silence + exemption tags.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-dock-position
crates.description: Cockpit dock position descriptor. Tracks one of (Left, Right, Top, Bottom, Floating{x, y}). move_to(edge) snaps the dock to that edge; float_to(x, y) clamps to viewport. Pure layout descriptor; distinct from side-panel-state (visible/collapsed) and window-position (free-window dragging).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-draft-autosave
crates.description: Periodic draft autosave for in-progress cockpit text fields.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-drag-drop
crates.description: Cockpit drag-and-drop interaction state — pure UX descriptor (source_id, source_kind, target_kind, valid_drop, position). The cockpit visualizes; actual mutations happen via separate command_ids.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-drag-handle
crates.description: Cockpit drag-handle gesture state machine. press(x,y) → move(x,y) → release(). Fires DragStart only after the cursor moves past `activation_px` from the press point, so a click is not mistaken for a drag. Pure state-machine crate; renderer subscribes to the event sequence.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-drag-snap-grid
crates.description: Snap-to-grid logic for drag positions and resizes.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-drag-state
crates.description: Drag operation state machine: start, hover, drop, cancel.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-drop-indicator
crates.description: Drop position indicator (Above/Below/Inside/None) from cursor + row box.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-drop-zone-set
crates.description: Drop-zone definition and accept-by-type validation for drag-drop UI.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-duration-formatter
crates.description: Duration formatter — ms → human string (d/h/m/s/ms).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-edit-mode
crates.description: Cockpit per-document edit-mode tracker. Each doc_id has a mode (Read/Edit/ReviewPending). request_edit, save_draft, submit_for_review, approve, reject transitions. is_dirty(doc_id) tracks unsaved changes. Pure descriptor; downstream callers fire mutation API calls.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-elevation-stack
crates.description: Z-index management for floating layers — push/pop with layer kinds.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-emergency-stop
crates.description: Emergency-stop button — double-confirm flow.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-emoji-reactions
crates.description: Per-message emoji reactions with per-user state and counts.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-emoji-shortcode
crates.description: Cockpit emoji shortcode registry. Maps colon-delimited shortcodes (:smile:) to emoji glyphs and supports prefix lookup for autocomplete. Registry can be reseeded; resolve(text) expands shortcodes inline. Pure presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-empty-search-state
crates.description: Cockpit empty-search-result display state. Classifies a no-results situation by cause (BlankQuery / NothingMatches / FilteredOut / NotIndexedYet) and chooses an operator-facing message + suggested-action. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-empty-state
crates.description: Cockpit empty-state catalog — per-view (No-Conversations / No-Dashboards / No-Replay / No-Bookmarks / No-Pins / No-Search-Results / No-Tasks / No-Toasts) the cockpit shows an operator-curated illustration + CTA. Pure UX surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-entity-chip-bar
crates.description: Removable entity chips with capacity overflow indicator.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-environment-pill
crates.description: Environment pill — Dev/Staging/Prod label with risk class.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-error-banner
crates.description: Cockpit error banner stack — persistent top-of-page error/warning banners (separate from ephemeral toasts). Each banner has (severity, title, body, dismissible, primary_action). Operator dismisses or acts. Pure UX surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-error-state-screen
crates.description: Large error/retry screen state with category + recovery offer + retry counter.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-export-bundle
crates.description: Cockpit operator export bundle — packages selected items (conversation thread, dashboard snapshot, pin board, replay session) into a single named export the operator can download / share. Pure UX wrapper; selfdef enforces access on content.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-export-format-picker
crates.description: Export format picker with per-format capabilities and user-default recall.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-external-link-policy
crates.description: Link classification: Internal / Trusted / Unknown external.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-fab
crates.description: Cockpit floating-action-button (FAB) state. Primary action + optional speed-dial of secondary actions revealed on long-press / hover. 4 corner positions, danger flag, visibility tied to scroll direction (auto-hide on scroll down). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-facet-counts
crates.description: Search-result facet sidebar counts with selection state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-favorites
crates.description: Cockpit operator-favorites registry. Per kind (dashboard/query/widget/contact/...), ordered Vec<Favorite{id, label, kind, pinned_at}>. star/unstar; reorder(kind, from, to). list_kind preserves order. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-feature-promo-banner
crates.description: Feature promo banner with per-user dismiss/snooze tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-feature-toggle-grid
crates.description: Cockpit settings-grid of feature toggles. Each entry is (id, label, hint, group, on, disabled_reason). toggle(id) flips when not disabled; disable(id, reason) locks off with a hint visible to the operator; visible_by_group() partitions entries into groups for the settings UI. Distinct from sovereign-dashboard-toggle (dashboard-visibility) — this is the feature-flag UI lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-feature-tour
crates.description: Cockpit guided feature-tour state machine. Ordered Step{id, anchor_id, title, body, dismissable}. start(tour_id); next/prev cursor; dismiss(reason) skips remainder; complete() marks tour finished. completed_tours() reports which tours the operator has fully completed. Distinct from onboarding-flow (one-time first-run) — this is the on-demand 'show me this feature' lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-fetch-state
crates.description: Cockpit fetch-state machine for an async resource. State{Idle/Loading{started_at}/Ready{loaded_at}/Errored{error, ts}}. Transitions start_loading/loaded/errored/reset. classify(now, stale_after_ms) detects Ready-but-stale. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-field-error
crates.description: Cockpit form-field error registry. Each (field_id, severity, message) is recorded; visible_in_severity(>=) and worst_for_field(id) drive how the renderer paints the field's helper text + ring color. Distinct from form-validity (form-level valid/invalid) and error-banner (page-level error).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-field-help
crates.description: Cockpit per-field help-text registry. Each field has (id, help_text, error_text, dismissed). resolve(id) returns the rendered HelpRender (Error wins over Help; both hidden if dismissed). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-filter-builder
crates.description: Boolean filter-clause builder for advanced search UI.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-filter-chip-bar
crates.description: Cockpit filter-chip bar state. Each chip is (id, label, value, removable). add/remove/clear_all with per-chip removable flag. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-filter-state
crates.description: Filter state with pending/applied diff + dirty tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-find-replace-bar
crates.description: Find/replace UI state with match counts and navigation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-flame-graph
crates.description: Flame-graph layout: stacked rectangles per (depth, sample weight).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-floating-panel-stack
crates.description: Floating panel z-order stack with focus tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-focus-mode
crates.description: Focus / distraction-free mode toggle with widget allowlist.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-focus-ring
crates.description: Cockpit keyboard-focus-ring visibility tracker. Modal :focus-visible behavior: emit a ring after a keyboard event, hide it after a pointer event, keep it on across focus transitions if the last input source was the keyboard. Pure state-machine crate; the renderer subscribes.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-focus-trap
crates.description: Cockpit focus-trap state. Tracks ordered focusable elements within an open modal/overlay and the currently-focused index. Tab cycles forward and wraps, Shift+Tab cycles backward and wraps, Escape signals dismissal. Pure UX descriptor (no IPS authority dimension).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-footer-bar
crates.description: Fixed footer bar — primary/secondary actions + status text.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-form-validity
crates.description: Cockpit form aggregate-validity state. Collects per-field validity records (required + error message) and reports whether the form may submit; tracks `touched` so 'Required' errors don't render until the operator has interacted with the field. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-frame-budget
crates.description: Per-frame work budget tracker — yield when budget exhausted.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-freshness-badge
crates.description: Freshness badge (Fresh/Stale/Revalidating/Failed) for cached data displays.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-friction-audit-panel
crates.description: Cockpit panel for the selfdef friction-audit boot-time gate — consumes the verdict ring buffer written by selfdef IPS at the file boundary; produces RenderRow values for the M060 main dashboard.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-frozen-columns
crates.description: Frozen leading/trailing columns with per-column offset computation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-fuzzy-ranker
crates.description: Cockpit fuzzy-search ranker. Scores candidate strings against an operator query using consecutive-match-bonus, word-start-bonus, case-insensitive matching, and penalty per skipped character. Returns descending-score ranked list with the chosen match positions. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-global-search
crates.description: Global cross-source search with named sources and result merging.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-grid-cursor
crates.description: Grid cursor — active cell with bounded movement.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-grouped-list
crates.description: Cockpit grouped-list (section list) state. Items are grouped by stable group_key with per-group `collapsed` flag. flat_render() emits an interleaved Vec<Row> (GroupHeader | Item) suitable for virtualized rendering, skipping items of collapsed groups. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-guardian-panel
crates.description: Cockpit panel for the selfdef IPS Guardian Daemon (sain-01 §10 guardian-core) — consumes the selfdef-emitted verdict ring buffer + OCSF jsonl at the file boundary; produces RenderRow values for the M066 main dashboard. Third leg of the three-watchdog trio (M060 friction-audit, M061 perimeter, M066 guardian).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-gutter-marker-set
crates.description: Code-gutter marker set keyed by line number with stable sorting.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-haptic-cue-policy
crates.description: Haptic-feedback policy with intensity tiers and per-channel mute.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-help-overlay
crates.description: Keyboard shortcut help overlay: sectioned entries with search.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-hero-stat-tile
crates.description: Hero stat tile — big number + label + delta indicator.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-high-contrast-mode
crates.description: High-contrast a11y mode with per-class color overrides.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-hint-card
crates.description: Hint card with dismiss + cooldown before re-show.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-history-stack
crates.description: Back/forward navigation stack with bounded depth.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-hover-card
crates.description: Cockpit hover-card state. Tracks target_id under cursor, dwell_ms before showing, fade_out_ms after leaving. tick_hover/tick_leave advance the state machine through Idle/Pending/Visible/FadingOut. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-hover-preview
crates.description: Cockpit hover-preview state. Pointer-driven peek window: enter(id, now)/leave(now)/anchor_hidden(now). visible(now) flips after dwell_ms; pinned tracks whether the operator clicked to pin the preview (then leave() does not close). Distinct from tooltip-delay (single-element tooltip) — this is the rich peek-window lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-icon-set-registry
crates.description: Icon set registry: named icons with size + colour variants.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-idle-lock-screen
crates.description: Idle-triggered lock screen state machine with grace + warn windows.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-image-load-state
crates.description: Per-image load lifecycle (Idle/Loading/Loaded/Failed) with placeholder.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-image-viewer-zoom
crates.description: Cockpit image-viewer zoom + pan state. Discrete zoom levels (25/50/75/100/125/150/200/300/400 %) with pan offset clamped so the image stays at least partially on-screen. fit_to_viewport picks the largest zoom that fits. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-incident-card
crates.description: Incident summary card with severity + first/last seen + affected count.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-incremental-search
crates.description: Cockpit find-in-page incremental search. set_query(q, total_matches) opens; next/prev cycles through 0..total_matches; current_index() reports 1-based for the chrome status bar ('3 of 12'). Pure descriptor; the chrome owns text-scanning + scroll-into-view.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-infinite-scroll
crates.description: Infinite-scroll loader bookkeeping with cursor and fetch state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-inline-annotation
crates.description: Text-range inline annotations with sticky position updates.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-inline-rename
crates.description: Inline rename pattern: idle/editing/committed with discard on Escape.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-input-debouncer
crates.description: Cockpit trailing-edge debouncer. observe(now_ms) records an input event; ready(now_ms) returns true once delay_ms has passed since the last observe. Pure timing crate; the consumer fires the debounced action when ready() flips true. Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-action-throttle (leading-edge cooldown).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-input-mask
crates.description: Cockpit formatted-input mask. Given a mask string (e.g. "###-###-####", "##/##/####", "####-####-####-####") and raw user input, returns the masked render + the captured digits-only value. Mask chars: '#' = ASCII digit, 'A' = letter, '*' = either; any other char is a literal placeholder. Pure presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-input-mode
crates.description: Cockpit input mode — operator-selectable input style (Mouse / KeyboardOnly / VimLike / Touch). Pure UX preference; the cockpit may hide irrelevant affordances per mode.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-input-validator-set
crates.description: Composable input validators: required, min/max length, regex-flavored simple matchers.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-item-pin
crates.description: Pin/unpin items with bounded max-pins; pinned-first ordering.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-job-progress-card
crates.description: Multi-stage job progress card (Pending/Running/Done/Failed per stage).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-job-tracker
crates.description: Long-running job progress: done/total counters with simple ETA.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-json-viewer
crates.description: Collapsible JSON tree viewer state with per-path expanded set.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-kanban-board
crates.description: Kanban board with named columns, WIP limits, and card move tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-kbd-hint
crates.description: Keyboard-shortcut inline hint surface (rendered as <kbd> chunks).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-key-binding-display
crates.description: Cockpit key-binding display formatter. Renders a Chord (modifiers + key) as a platform-appropriate string. Mac uses Apple glyphs ⌘ ⇧ ⌥ ⌃ ↩ ⌫ ⎋, Linux/Windows use 'Ctrl', 'Shift', 'Alt', 'Super'. Pure presentation crate; the binding capture/registry lives elsewhere.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-key-stack
crates.description: Cockpit key-stack chord recorder. Records the last N keystrokes within a sliding time window for multi-keystroke chord recognition (Vim-style 'gg', emacs-style 'C-x C-f'). matches(prefix) returns true when the last K keys equal a registered chord prefix. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-keyboard-chord-detector
crates.description: Keyboard chord (Ctrl+K then S, vim-style) detector with timeout.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-keyboard-layout
crates.description: Cockpit keyboard-layout selector. Layout{Qwerty/QwertyUk/Dvorak/Colemak/Azerty} + per-layout description label. set(layout); current() returns the chosen layout. description(layout) returns the operator-facing label. Pure descriptor for the settings UI; keystroke physical-key remap lives in the OS, not the cockpit.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-keyboard-pillbox
crates.description: Cockpit keyboard-chord pillbox renderer. Parses chord strings ('Ctrl+Shift+K', 'Cmd+/', 'Esc') into ordered modifier+key Pill tokens for visual rendering with OS-specific symbol resolution (Mac uses ⌘/⌥/⇧/⌃; others use spelled modifiers). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-keymap-editor
crates.description: Cockpit keymap editor state. Operator-managed action→chord bindings with a capture buffer for the in-progress chord. start_capture/finalize_capture/cancel_capture, conflict detection against existing bindings. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-keystroke-map
crates.description: Cockpit keyboard shortcut registry — operator-customizable shortcut bindings (Ctrl/Shift/Alt + key -> action-id) with conflict detection. Each binding declares the (modifiers, key, action_id, scope, description). The cockpit reads this to render the shortcut overlay + dispatch keypresses.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-keystroke-sequence
crates.description: Cockpit multi-keystroke sequence matcher (Vim-style 'g g', 'd d', leader-key chord). register(action_id, &[keys]); observe(key, now_ms) returns Matched{action_id}/Partial/None. Sequences time out after sequence_timeout_ms. Pure descriptor; distinct from sovereign-cockpit-keystroke-map (single-key).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-kpi-tile-grid
crates.description: Dashboard KPI tile grid with formatting and threshold-based status.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-language-pack
crates.description: Cockpit i18n language pack — operator-provided translation table keyed by string-key → translated-text per locale_tag. Falls back to default-language entry when key missing in active locale. Pure UX.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-lazy-loader
crates.description: Lazy resource loader — Idle/Loading/Loaded/Failed per resource id.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-leaderboard
crates.description: Cockpit ranked-list state. Each Row{id, label, score: i64}. submit (replaces a row's score), ranked() returns rows sorted score-desc with rank field assigned. Tied scores get the same rank; next rank skips the tie count. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-lightbox-overlay
crates.description: Fullscreen image-lightbox overlay state with prev/next/close.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-linkify
crates.description: Linkify text — emit Spans for URL / @mention / #hashtag.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-live-collab-cursors
crates.description: Per-peer live cursor positions in a shared document with stale-cull.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-loading-eta
crates.description: Cockpit loading-bar ETA estimator. observe(progress_pct, now) records up to N samples; eta_ms(now) returns Some(remaining_ms) once at least two distinct progress samples exist and the trajectory is positive. Linear extrapolation across the most-recent two samples. Pure timing math; distinct from progress-bar / progress-tracker (visual).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-locale-state
crates.description: Cockpit locale state — operator-selectable display locale (BCP-47 tag) + date-format + number-format + first-day-of-week. Pure UX; the cockpit renders timestamps + numbers according to these preferences.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-log-level-filter
crates.description: Log-level filter — Trace..Error min-threshold + per-level counts.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-log-tail-viewer
crates.description: Bounded ring-buffer log tail viewer with level filter and substring search.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-macro-recorder
crates.description: Cockpit macro recorder. start(name) opens a recording; observe(action_id, ts_ms) appends, with relative-delay capture; stop() seals into a SavedMacro with id+name+events. saved() lists; play_sequence(id) returns the ordered events for the player. Pure descriptor; the chrome owns input + playback.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-marquee-loop
crates.description: Cockpit marquee loop. When a label's text_px exceeds its container_px, returns an x_offset that loops [0..gap+text_px] over time. Below the threshold the label is static. Pure presentation crate; reduced-motion mode forces static.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-memory-meter
crates.description: Cockpit memory-usage gauge. Tracks (used_bytes, total_bytes) + warn/critical % thresholds. used_pct, zone (Normal/Warn/Critical), render_display ('1.4 GB / 8 GB (17%)' with GB/MB/KB unit selection). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-mention-resolver
crates.description: Segments text into plain/mention tokens, resolving @handles to known users.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-mention-suggester
crates.description: Cockpit @-mention typeahead suggester. observe(input, cursor) detects an active '@query' token; suggest(operators, max) returns up to `max` operators whose handle starts with the query. Pure presentation primitive; chrome wires the typeahead UI.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-merge-conflict-ui
crates.description: Three-way merge conflict UI state with per-hunk resolution.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-message-composer
crates.description: Multi-line message composer state with draft, attachments, and send affordances.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-metric-card
crates.description: Composable metric card — title, value, trend, sparkline.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-mini-map
crates.description: Cockpit minimap viewport-rect state. Given content (w, h) and viewport (x, y, w, h), computes the scaled minimap dimensions + the viewport-rect within the minimap. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-minimap-state
crates.description: Minimap geometry — viewport ↔ minimap-rect mapping.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-modal-stack
crates.description: Cockpit modal stack — stacked Z-ordered modal dialogs (top draws above bottom; backdrop dims through the whole stack). Pure UX state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-mode-profile-switch
crates.description: Mode/profile switching with active tracking and history of last N switches.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-month-picker
crates.description: Month/year picker with bounded range and disabled-months.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-multi-line-input
crates.description: Cockpit multi-line text input state. Tracks buffer, soft-wrap at `soft_wrap_cols` (with grapheme-safe lookback), and auto-grow rows up to `max_rows`. line_count() and visible_lines() helpers. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-multi-select-list
crates.description: Cockpit multi-selection list state. Tracks an anchor + selected set, with Click (replace), Ctrl/Cmd+Click (toggle one), and Shift+Click (range from anchor) semantics. select_all and clear convenience. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-multi-sort
crates.description: Multi-column sort — ordered (column, direction) chain.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-multi-step-form
crates.description: Cockpit multi-step form navigator. Step{id, label, required_fields, completed_fields}. next_allowed_from(step_id) returns true only when all required fields are completed. percent_complete sums across all steps. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-network-meter
crates.description: Cockpit network throughput meter. Tracks (last_rx_bytes, last_tx_bytes, last_sample_unix_ms) + new sample to compute rx_bps + tx_bps. render_display formats 'A KB/s ↓ / B KB/s ↑' with auto unit. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-notification-center
crates.description: Cockpit notification center — persistent operator inbox (distinct from ephemeral toasts). Each notification carries (id, severity, title, body, source, read_state, archived). Operator marks read/unread, archives, filters by source. Pure UX surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-notification-prefs
crates.description: Per-channel notification preferences with do-not-disturb windows.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-number-format
crates.description: Cockpit number formatter. Renders an i64 with a configurable thousands separator and (for cents) a decimal separator + minor-unit width. Includes a compact mode that abbreviates with k/M/B/T to a chosen significant-digit count. Pure presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-numeric-stepper
crates.description: Cockpit numeric stepper. Tracks i64 value with step/min/max, clamps and snaps to nearest valid step on set(). Optional wrap mode. inc/dec move by step, with shift-multiplier for large jumps. Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-stepper (multi-step wizard) — this is the +/- number input.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-object-fit
crates.description: Object-fit geometry — Contain/Cover/Fill/None/ScaleDown.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-onboarding-flow
crates.description: Cockpit first-run onboarding flow — 8-step guided tour (welcome / theme / locale / profile / first-conversation / dashboard-tour / replay-tour / done). Operator advances forward/back/skip. Pure UX state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-online-status
crates.description: Cockpit online-status indicator state. 4 states (Online/Reconnecting/Offline/Unknown) with reason text + last_seen timestamp. tick(now) auto-degrades Online → Reconnecting → Offline after configurable timeouts when no heartbeat. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-operation-receipt
crates.description: Bounded recent-operation receipts (success/failure with message).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-output-pane
crates.description: Captured stdout/stderr pane with bounded buffer + line classification.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-overflow-shadow
crates.description: Cockpit scroll-overflow shadow indicators. Given a scrollable region's (scroll_top, viewport_h, content_h), returns which edge shadows should be visible (Top / Bottom / Both / None) with intensity 0..=255 ramping over the configured fade distance. Pure presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-page-title
crates.description: Cockpit window/tab title manager. Stack-style: push(label) descends, pop() ascends; current_title(separator, suffix) joins from outermost → innermost with the optional app suffix. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-page-transition
crates.description: Cockpit page-transition state. Models 4 transition phases (Idle/Outgoing/Entering/Active), driven by tick(ms_elapsed) against operator-configured durations per phase. Direction tracks forward/back navigation for the renderer's slide direction. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pagination
crates.description: Pagination state machine: current/per_page/total → page/total_pages/can_next/can_prev/range.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pagination-status
crates.description: Cockpit pagination status-text formatter. Given (page, page_size, total_items, filtered) produces the operator-facing strings 'Showing 1-50 of 1,000' / 'Showing 1-50 of 1,000 (filtered from 10,000)' / 'No items'. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pane-layout
crates.description: Cockpit multi-pane window layout — operator-selectable split modes (Single / SplitVertical / SplitHorizontal / QuadGrid). Each pane holds a Tab reference (id). Validates that the number of populated panes matches the chosen split.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-paste-format-detector
crates.description: Cockpit heuristic detector for pasted clipboard text. detect(text) classifies it as Url / Json / CodeBlock / Markdown / Csv / PlainText, so the chrome can offer a context-appropriate 'Paste as …' menu. Pure heuristic; no parsing or validation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-perimeter-panel
crates.description: Cockpit panel for the selfdef IPS real-time security perimeter (Tetragon sovereign-kernel-fence) — consumes the selfdef-emitted OCSF jsonl + verdict ring buffer at the file boundary; produces RenderRow values for the M061 main dashboard.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-permission-prompt
crates.description: Permission-request prompt state — Idle/Pending/Granted/Denied with remembered choices.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-personalization
crates.description: Per-operator UX personalization layer for the cockpit per M060 R10137 + R10140 + R10141 + R10173-R10175. Theme (dark/light/auto) + accent color + typography scale + per-profile preference layering. Operator standing direction verbatim: 'endless configurations and options and personalization's'.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pill-input
crates.description: Multi-value pill input field with split/dedup/max-cap.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pin-board
crates.description: Cockpit pin board — corkboard-like wall of operator-pinned snippets / links / notes. Each PinCard declares (id, title, kind, body, color, position). Max 50 cards. Pure visual UX.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pinned-shortcuts
crates.description: Cockpit pinned-shortcut bar — operator-curated quick-launch buttons surfaced on the top-right. Each pin declares (id, label, icon, command_id, color). Max 8 pins; pins reorderable via swap; duplicates rejected.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pip-window
crates.description: Cockpit picture-in-picture window state. Holds content_id (which dashboard/widget is pinned), Corner{TL/TR/BL/BR}, and size in px. move_to(corner)/resize(w, h)/set_content(id). hide() returns to inline. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pipeline-stage
crates.description: Pipeline stage status with deps and resolve.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-playback-scrubber
crates.description: Playback scrubber — playhead position + drag state + click-to-seek.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-popover-anchor
crates.description: Cockpit popover anchor positioning. Given anchor rect + popover size + viewport size + preferred placement, returns the resolved (x, y) plus the effective placement, flipping to the opposite side when the preferred side overflows. Pure layout math; no DOM.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-popover-stack
crates.description: Cockpit popover stack with z-order, dismiss-on-outside-click signal, and parent-popover lineage. Only the topmost popover responds to escape; closing a popover closes all child popovers. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-presence-mode
crates.description: Cockpit presence mode (Focus / Standard / Glance / Off / DoNotDisturb). Each mode carries a notification-policy (suppress, summarize, all), a refresh-cadence (high/medium/low/paused), and an animations flag. set(mode) updates the state; classify_event(severity) returns Suppress/Summarize/Show by current mode. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-presence-roster
crates.description: Cockpit presence roster for collaborators. Each entry holds (operator_id, label, status: Online/Idle/Busy/Offline, last_seen_ts). set/observe; mark_idle_if_older(now, threshold_ms) flips Online → Idle when last_seen too old. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-preset-chip-bar
crates.description: Saved-preset chip bar with last-applied tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-press-and-hold
crates.description: Press-and-hold gauge for destructive-action confirmation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-print-options
crates.description: Cockpit print-dialog state. PrintOptions{orientation: Portrait/Landscape, paper_size: A4/Letter/Legal, scale_pct (50..=200), color: Color/Greyscale, copies, page_range: All/From{from,to}}. setters validate ranges. Pure descriptor; chrome triggers the actual print.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-priority-display
crates.description: Cockpit task-priority display formatter. Priority{Low/Med/High/Critical/Blocker} → (label, color_token, glyph) for the chrome to render consistent priority chips/icons. Pure mapping.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-progress-bar
crates.description: Cockpit progress-bar widget state. Determinate (0..=100) or Indeterminate, optional buffered (e.g., download head ahead of playback head), color thresholds for warn/critical zones. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-progress-segmented
crates.description: Cockpit segmented-progress descriptor. Tracks N named segments + per-segment state (Pending/Active/Completed/Failed). advance_to(id) marks all prior as Completed; fail(id) marks as Failed (clamps); rewind(id) resets to Pending. Distinct from progress-bar (continuous 0..=100) — this is the N-step batch / pipeline progress lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-progress-tracker
crates.description: Cockpit progress tracker — set of running background tasks with progress (0..100 or indeterminate) + estimated remaining time. Pure UX state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-pull-to-refresh
crates.description: Cockpit pull-to-refresh gesture state machine. start/move/release events with a trigger_px threshold. State transitions Idle → Pulling{distance, progress} → Armed → Refreshing → Idle. Pure presentation state machine; the actual refresh I/O is callee-owned.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-quick-action
crates.description: Cockpit quick-action one-tap button registry. Each QuickAction is (id, label, icon, hotkey, enabled). Bounded MRU favorites bubble most-used to the top. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-quick-action-bar
crates.description: Cockpit quick-action bar — operator-curated horizontal bar of frequently-used commands (max 12). Each slot holds (command_id, label, icon, shortcut_chord). Operator drags-to-reorder. Pure UX.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-quick-filter
crates.description: Cockpit quick filter — multi-chip filter UI (operator picks tags, types, severities, sources to AND/OR over a result list). Pure UX state with predicate evaluation against simple key-value rows.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-quick-jump
crates.description: Cockpit quick-jump (Ctrl+G-style) registry. Registers JumpTarget{short_id, kind, full_path, label}; resolve(short_id) returns the matching target. short_id is the operator-typed shortcut (e.g. '@logs', '#1234'). Distinct from full text-search — this is the explicit-shortcut lane.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-quick-notes
crates.description: Bounded quick-notes list with pinning + done marking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-radial-gauge
crates.description: Radial / circular gauge state with thresholds + fill ratio.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-radio-group
crates.description: Cockpit radio-group widget state. Ordered options with a single mutually-exclusive selection. Arrow keys wrap. Required-flag flags an empty selection as invalid for form-submit gates. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-rate-limit-banner
crates.description: Cockpit throttling banner state. Reads from a rate-limit decision (Allowed/Throttled{retry_after_ms}) and produces operator-facing copy + a countdown display. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-rating-stars
crates.description: Cockpit rating-stars widget state. N-star scale (3/5/7/10) with optional half-star granularity and `allow_clear` (click the active star to clear). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-reading-progress
crates.description: Reading-progress tracker — offset / total + est. time remaining.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-recent-files
crates.description: Bounded MRU list of recently-opened files.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-recent-items
crates.description: Cockpit recent-items panel — operator's recently-viewed conversations / dashboards / replays / pin boards. LRU eviction. Each entry (kind, subject_id, label, visited_at). Pure UX.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-recipient-list
crates.description: To/cc/bcc recipient lists with dedup + cross-list dedup.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-relative-time
crates.description: Human-readable relative-time formatting — 'just now' / 'N seconds ago' / 'N minutes ago' / 'N hours ago' / 'N days ago' / 'on YYYY-MM-DD'.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-reorderable-list
crates.description: Cockpit drag-to-reorder list state. begin_drag(from)/hover(over)/drop() transitions; computes the resulting order after each commit. move_to(from, to) shorthand bypasses the gesture. Pure descriptor; the drag-handle/drag-drop crates supply the gesture events.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-reply-form
crates.description: Inline reply form state with draft autosave + dirty tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-request-list
crates.description: In-flight cockpit requests with status + progress + cancel.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-resize-handle
crates.description: Cockpit split-pane resize handle state. Captures (orientation, current_px, min_px, max_px, dragging). drag(delta) clamps to bounds; reset() restores to a stored default. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-resize-observer
crates.description: Cockpit resize-observer state. Tracks (element_id → (w, h)) and emits a SizeChanged delta only when the change exceeds noise_threshold_px in either dimension. observe(id, w, h) returns Changed{prev_w, prev_h, new_w, new_h}/SubThreshold/FirstSeen. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-result-card
crates.description: Search-result card list with score sorting + top-N.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-result-page-cursor
crates.description: Bidirectional page cursor for search-result navigation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-retry-banner
crates.description: Retry-banner state with countdown + attempt counter.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-rich-text-toolbar
crates.description: Cockpit rich-text editor toolbar state. Tracks inline-mark toggles (Bold/Italic/Underline/Code/Strike) + block kind (Paragraph/H1/H2/H3/List/Quote/CodeBlock). active() marks for the current cursor position. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-rollout-banner
crates.description: Feature-rollout banner — Beta/EarlyAccess label + cohort + dismiss-once.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-route-history
crates.description: Cockpit route history — bounded back/forward stack for operator UI navigation (dashboards, conversations, settings). Pure UX state with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-row-actions
crates.description: Cockpit per-row contextual actions (left + right swipe / hover). Each row carries left_actions + right_actions (id, label, severity, requires_confirm). Pure descriptor; the chrome wires the gestures + paints them.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-row-density
crates.description: Cockpit per-density row-height resolver. 4 densities (Compact/Cozy/Comfortable/Spacious) → row_height_px + line_count + show_secondary flags. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-row-expansion
crates.description: Per-row expansion state with lazy-load flag for table rows.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-row-hover-affordance
crates.description: Tracks which row's hover affordances should be visible (focus or pointer).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-rubber-band
crates.description: Mouse-drag rubber-band selection rectangle.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-save-as-suggest
crates.description: Save-as filename suggester — increment suffix on collision.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-saved-search-set
crates.description: Named saved-search set with recency-and-frequency ordering.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-saved-view
crates.description: Cockpit operator-saved-view registry. Each SavedView holds (id, scope_id, filters: JSON blob, sort: JSON blob, columns: Vec<String>, created_at). create/list/by_scope/rename/delete. Pure descriptor — the chrome reapplies the captured blobs on activation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-scheduler-panel
crates.description: Cockpit panel for the selfdef IPS Goldilocks Scheduler (avx-plus-plus dump tail 18000-18250) — consumes the selfdef-emitted scheduler decision ring buffer + audit log at the file boundary; produces RenderRow values for the cockpit dashboard. Fourth member of the four-watchdog set (M060 friction-audit, M061 perimeter, M066 guardian, this = scheduler).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-screen-reader-hints
crates.description: Cockpit screen-reader accessibility hints — operator-curated ARIA-style hints per element_id (role / label / live-region politeness). Pure UX accessibility layer.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-scroll-anchor
crates.description: Preserve scroll position when content prepends — chat/log anchoring.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-scroll-lock
crates.description: Cockpit body-scroll-lock. Refcounted lock so multiple stacked modals/popovers don't unlock the body when one closes. acquire(reason)/release(id) pair; locked() reports the current state and the open holders. Pure presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-scroll-restore
crates.description: Cockpit scroll-restoration state. Remembers per-route scroll offsets in a bounded LRU so navigating back/forward returns the operator to where they last were on each surface. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-scroll-shadow-state
crates.description: Top/bottom scroll-shadow visibility derived from scroll position.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-scroll-spy
crates.description: Cockpit scroll-spy. Maps scroll position to the currently-active section in a scrollable region (TOC / left-nav highlight). Tracks N sections with (id, top_px) and reports the section whose top crosses an activation offset. Pure UX-presentation crate.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-search-filter
crates.description: Cockpit composite-search filter state. Tracks (query_text, facet_set, sort_key, sort_direction) bundled into one immutable snapshot so the data layer can request results deterministically. apply_facet / clear_facets / set_query / set_sort mutators. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-search-highlight
crates.description: Cockpit search-highlight ranges. Given an operator query and a candidate haystack string, computes the byte ranges that should be visually highlighted (case-insensitive subsequence of query chars). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-search-history
crates.description: Recent-query ring buffer with MRU semantics + dedup + bounded capacity for cockpit search bars.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-search-input
crates.description: Cockpit search-input widget state. Buffer + debounce ms + last-submitted snapshot + clear button visibility derived from buffer non-empty. should_emit(now) returns true when debounce window has elapsed since the last keystroke. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-search-scope
