crates.description: Cockpit search-scope selector. Tracks the set of available Scope chips (id, label, enabled) and one currently-active scope. activate(id) selects; available() returns enabled scopes for the bar; default() returns the canonical fallback when active is not enabled. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-secret-reveal
crates.description: Masked-secret reveal toggle with auto-mask after timeout.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-segmented-control
crates.description: Cockpit segmented-control widget. Mutually-exclusive selection from 2-6 segments (id, label, enabled). select() / next() / prev() navigate through enabled segments; arrow keys wrap. Pure UX descriptor (similar to RadioGroup but rendered as a horizontal pill bar).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-selection-summary
crates.description: Selected-items summary — count, sum, unique categories.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-service-status
crates.description: Per-service status board with fleet roll-up.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-settings-form
crates.description: Multi-section settings form with dirty tracking and apply/discard semantics.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-share-link
crates.description: Cockpit share-link state — operator-generated time-bounded share URLs for conversation excerpts / dashboard snapshots / replay sessions. Carries (target_id, kind, expires_at, recipient_tag). Pure UX wrapper; actual access control lives in selfdef.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-shimmer-phase
crates.description: Cockpit skeleton-shimmer phase calculator. phase(now_ms) returns 0..1000 (per-mille) cycling over period_ms; offset_for_anchor(anchor_id, now_ms) gives a per-anchor stagger so adjacent skeletons don't pulse in lockstep. Pure math; renderer paints.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-shortcut-cheatsheet
crates.description: Cockpit shortcut cheatsheet generator — given a KeystrokeMap, produces a per-scope grouped, operator-readable cheatsheet (Markdown / plain-text) the cockpit's `?` overlay renders. Pure visual UX layer over sovereign-cockpit-keystroke-map.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-shortcut-conflicts
crates.description: Cockpit keyboard-shortcut conflict detector. Each Binding is (chord, scope, command). detect_conflicts() finds chords that overlap between or within scopes (Global > PaneFocused > InputFocused), returning a typed Conflict list the operator settings UI can surface. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-shortcut-recorder
crates.description: Cockpit chord-capture recorder. arm() opens a recording session; record(modifiers, non_modifier_key) finalizes; cancel() drops. Rejects bare-modifier chords and the literal Escape key (reserved for cancel). last_captured() returns the most-recent capture; clear() drops it. Pure descriptor; the chrome supplies the raw event stream.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-side-by-side-diff
crates.description: Cockpit two-pane diff alignment state. Given a unified line list (left_lineno, right_lineno, kind: Context/Add/Remove/Change), produces aligned pairs for the two-pane renderer (empty cells with `Spacer` kind for missing sides). Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-text-diff (string diff).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-side-drawer
crates.description: Side-drawer state: open/closed, push vs overlay, edge, width.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-side-nav-state
crates.description: Cockpit side navigation state — operator-collapsible / pinned side panel state (left | right anchor, expanded / collapsed / pinned, width-px). Pure UX visual.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-side-panel-state
crates.description: Cockpit side-panel (drawer) state. 4 panel modes (Closed/Peek/Open/Pinned), an active tab id, and a remembered width per mode. open/close/pin toggles + last_used MRU tab list. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-skeleton-list
crates.description: Cockpit skeleton-list state. Renders N placeholder rows of randomized-but-deterministic widths during data-fetch loading, then transitions to Loaded once data arrives. Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-skeleton-loader (single block) — this is the list-shape variant. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-skeleton-loader
crates.description: Cockpit skeleton loader catalog — placeholder shapes (rectangles / circles / lines) the cockpit renders while real content loads. Per view-type (conversation / dashboard / replay / table) declares its skeleton layout. Pure UX.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-skeleton-template
crates.description: Cockpit skeleton-row template registry. Templates declared as Vec<Block{kind: Line/Circle/Box, w, h}>. render(template_id, count) returns Vec<RenderedRow> for the chrome to paint. Distinct from skeleton-loader (single placeholder) and skeleton-list (count-only).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-skip-link-set
crates.description: Keyboard skip-link set for accessible cockpit landmarks.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-snackbar-queue
crates.description: Cockpit snackbar/toast queue state. FIFO of transient notifications with severity, auto-dismiss TTL, max-concurrent visible, and a separate dismissed log so the cockpit can build a 'recent notifications' panel. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-snapshot-toolbar
crates.description: Cockpit snapshot navigation toolbar (replay scrubber). Ordered snapshot list + current index + play/pause/step-forward/step-back/jump. Pure UX descriptor for the replay timeline UI.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-snippet-library
crates.description: Cockpit operator-curated snippet library. Each Snippet{id, name, body, trigger, tags}. add/remove; search(query, tag_filter) ranks by exact name → trigger → name-prefix → body-contains. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-sound-preferences
crates.description: Cockpit sound preferences — per BannerSeverity, operator picks a notification sound (None / Soft / Standard / Sharp / Alarm) + master volume 0..100. Pure UX with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-spacing-scale
crates.description: Design-token spacing scale — xs/sm/md/lg/xl/xxl/xxxl → px.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-sparkline
crates.description: Cockpit sparkline projection. Given a fixed-width ring of f64 values + viewport pixel width + height, emits per-bar normalized heights for direct render. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-spinner-pool
crates.description: Cockpit spinner-pool aggregator. Tracks N concurrent named spinners with started_at + cancellable flag. show_status() returns the operator-facing label ('Loading…' / '3 background tasks…' / specific spinner label), suppressing flicker for very short-lived spinners (<200ms). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-split-button
crates.description: Split button — primary action + dropdown menu of alternatives.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-split-pane
crates.description: Cockpit split-pane state. Tracks two panes separated by a draggable gutter at split_px from one edge. set_split clamps to (min_a_px, container_size - min_b_px). drag_to performs the same clamping. Includes collapse-to-min snap zones for snap-on-near-edge behavior. Pure layout math.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-split-view-state
crates.description: Split view state: orientation, ratio, collapsible side, min sizes.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stack-trace-viewer
crates.description: Stack-trace frame viewer with collapse-deps + frame-classification.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stale-banner
crates.description: Cockpit stale-content banner state. Tracks last_refresh_ms + max_fresh_ms threshold; status() returns Fresh/Slightly Stale/Stale/Very Stale with human-readable age. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stat-card
crates.description: Cockpit single-stat KPI card descriptor. StatCard{id, label, value_text, hint, trend_chip: Option<TrendChip{percent_x100, direction}>, sparkline_source_id: Option<String>}. register/update/list. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stat-trend
crates.description: Cockpit stat-trend indicator. Given (previous, current) numeric pair, returns Trend{direction: Up/Down/Flat, percent_change_x100, color_hint: Positive/Negative/Neutral}. direction uses a configurable flat_threshold_x100 (basis points). Color is independent of direction: a 'decrease in errors' is Positive, so the caller supplies the metric polarity.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-state
crates.description: Unified cockpit-side state envelope — composes sovereign-mirror-publisher + sovereign-dashboard-coverage + sovereign-dashboard-toggle + sovereign-cockpit-personalization + sovereign-trinity + sovereign-module-catalog into one re-loadable snapshot. Persisted to /var/lib/sovereign-os/cockpit-state.json. Counterpart to selfdef-state-snapshot on the IPS side.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-status-aggregator
crates.description: Cockpit aggregate-status state. Collects N subsystem statuses (Ok/Degraded/Down/Unknown) into one global headline status by taking the worst case; reports per-subsystem details and a percentage breakdown. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-status-badge
crates.description: Cockpit status badge — small per-state UI chip the operator can pin to the top bar (Active / Inactive / Live-Recording / Replay-Active / DRY-RUN). Operator picks visibility per badge + label override. Pure UX surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-status-bar-segments
crates.description: Status bar segments: left/center/right zones with priority-based overflow.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-status-light
crates.description: Cockpit status-light registry. Each subject (id) carries a current Tone (Healthy/Degraded/Offline/Unknown) + reason label + last-update ts. set(id, tone, reason, now); worst() returns the worst tone across all subjects; stale(id, now, ttl) reports if the last update is older than ttl. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-status-page-list
crates.description: Cockpit status-page registry. Each StatusPage{id, label, url, current_state, last_check_ts}. register/update_state/list_all/list_by_state. Pure descriptor for the chrome to render a 'services we depend on' status grid.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-status-pulse
crates.description: Cockpit pulsing-indicator state. Computes a 0..=100 brightness % from (now_ms, period_ms) following a triangular wave so a status dot pulses smoothly. Pulses only when active flag true; static brightness otherwise. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-step-dots
crates.description: Page-indicator dots for carousels / onboarding flows.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-step-indicator
crates.description: Cockpit visual step-indicator (numbered bullets connected by a progress line). Pure visual projection of a Stepper-like sequence: emits per-step Visual{number, label, state, connector_filled}. Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-stepper which manages STATE; this one RENDERS.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stepper
crates.description: Cockpit multi-step wizard state. Ordered steps with per-step status (NotStarted/Active/Done/Error/Skipped), forward/back navigation that respects step gating, completion check. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-streak-indicator
crates.description: Consecutive-success streak counter with best/current per key.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stream-pause
crates.description: Cockpit live-stream pause/resume state. pause()/resume(); observe(arrived) increments queued count only while paused. queued_count() reports the staged buffer size. drop_queued() empties the buffer (operator chose to discard while away). Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-stream-render-state
crates.description: Streaming render state: chunks, completion, errored, abort.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-submenu-tree
crates.description: Hierarchical submenu tree with expand/collapse and active-path tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-swipe-gesture
crates.description: Horizontal/vertical swipe gesture detector with velocity threshold.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-sync-status
crates.description: Sync status indicator — Saved / Saving / Failed / Stale.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tab-history
crates.description: Closed-tab history with reopen + capacity.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tab-manager
crates.description: Tab manager: open/close/switch/pin/reorder with pinned-first ordering.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tab-overflow
crates.description: Cockpit tab-strip overflow partition. Given ordered tabs with per-tab widths, a measured container width, and an `active` id pin, computes which tabs render inline and which fall into an overflow chevron dropdown — always keeping the active tab visible. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tab-strip
crates.description: Cockpit tab strip — operator-managed top-of-window tab list. Each Tab declares (id, kind, label, payload_id, pinned). 5 tab kinds (Conversation/Dashboard/Replay/Search/Settings). Max 20 tabs; pinned tabs cannot be closed.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-table-of-contents
crates.description: Hierarchical table of contents with active-heading tracking.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-table-row-selection
crates.description: Cockpit table-row selection (with select-all-rows checkbox). Tracks a per-row selection + a header tristate (None/Some/All). Selecting from the header toggles all visible rows; per-row click flips that row. Distinct from multi-select-list (range/shift semantics).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-table-summary-row
crates.description: Cockpit table footer-row aggregator descriptor. Each column declares an Aggregator{Sum/Avg/Min/Max/Count/None} on its data kind; compute(rows) returns the summary row. Pure math; the chrome renders the row beneath the data.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tag-cloud
crates.description: Cockpit weighted tag-cloud projection. Given (label, weight) pairs, computes per-tag font_size_pct in [min..max] linearly from observed weight range. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tag-color-palette
crates.description: Tag color palette: assign discrete colors to tags with deterministic fallback.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tag-input
crates.description: Cockpit tag-input widget state. Accumulates an ordered list of unique tags as the operator types and commits with Enter/Tab/Comma; backspace on empty buffer pops the last tag. Enforces tag length, total count, and casing rules. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tap-target
crates.description: Tap-target registry with minimum size + aria-label enforcement.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-task-stack
crates.description: Cockpit operator-task stack. push/pop tasks; current() returns the active task (top of stack); peek_below() returns the next-up task (for breadcrumb-style display). Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-diff
crates.description: Cockpit line-level text-diff renderer. Given before/after line lists, produces a Vec<DiffRow> (Same/Added/Removed) using a simple linear scan with longest-common-prefix/suffix detection. Pure UX descriptor (sufficient for small diffs in the cockpit; large diffs should use a server-side diff).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-direction-mode
crates.description: LTR/RTL text-direction mode with locale binding.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-input-counter
crates.description: Cockpit text-input with character counter. Tracks buffer + min/max length + counter display (used/max). Mode: Soft (counter only) or Hard (rejects keystrokes that would exceed max). render_counter() emits operator-facing remaining string. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-metrics
crates.description: Cockpit text-metrics: chars (UTF-8 codepoints), graphemes (best-effort: codepoints + skip ZWJ), words (whitespace-split), lines, and bytes. measure() returns TextMetrics. Distinct from sovereign-cockpit-text-input-counter (single-input limit indicator) — this is the underlying metric computation.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-selection-range
crates.description: Text selection range set with merge/clear semantics.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-size-policy
crates.description: Accessibility text-size policy with scale presets and per-element override.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-truncate
crates.description: String truncation — Start/Middle/End modes with ellipsis.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-text-truncation
crates.description: Char-aware text truncation for cockpit rows — ellipsize mid/end/middle so narrow columns stay readable.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-theme-palette
crates.description: Cockpit color theme palette — operator picks Light / Dark / HighContrast / Solarized / Sepia, the cockpit renders backgrounds + foregrounds + accents accordingly. Pure visual UX with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-thumbs-vote
crates.description: Per-item per-user thumbs up/down vote with aggregated tally.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-ticker-tape
crates.description: Horizontal status-line ticker tape with priority and TTL items.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tile-grid-layout
crates.description: Bounded W×H tile grid: rectangular tile placements with overlap detection.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-time-picker
crates.description: Cockpit time-picker widget state. Hour [0..24) + minute [0..60) with operator-configured step (1/5/15/30) and optional 12h/24h display. step_up/step_down navigate by step, wrapping minute carries to hour. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-time-range-selector
crates.description: Cockpit time-range selector. Preset{Last5m / Last15m / LastHour / Last24h / Last7d / Last30d} or Custom{from_ms, to_ms}. resolve(now) returns (from_ms, to_ms). Validates from < to for Custom. Pure descriptor; the chart consumer queries the resolved range.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-timeline-axis
crates.description: Cockpit chart timeline axis. ticks(from_ms, to_ms, target_count) picks a tick interval from a curated set (1s, 5s, 15s, 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 6h, 1d, 7d) closest to (range / target_count), returns evenly-spaced ts within [from, to]. Pure math; chart renderer paints.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-timezone-bar
crates.description: Multi-timezone display bar with named zones + offset.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tip-bar
crates.description: Cockpit context-aware bottom tip strip. Registers Tip{scope_id, message, chord}; tips_for(scope_id) returns the in-scope tips for the strip. dismiss(message) hides a specific tip permanently; restore_all() un-hides. Pure descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-titlebar-config
crates.description: Cockpit titlebar configuration with segmented title and status pinning.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-toast-position
crates.description: Cockpit toast positioning + stacking. Operator-configurable corner anchor; stacking direction derived from corner (top-* stacks down, bottom-* stacks up). layout(toasts, container_h) computes per-toast (x, y) px positions. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-toast-stack
crates.description: Toast notification stack with auto-dismiss timers + severity-ordered eviction + bounded capacity.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-toast-tray
crates.description: Cockpit ephemeral toast tray — per-severity FIFO queue of operator-visible notifications with TTL-based eviction + manual dismissal + count caps. Distinct from the persistent banner: toasts surface ephemeral events (a build finished, a download succeeded) that auto-dismiss.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-todo-list
crates.description: Operator todo list with status, ordering, and completion stats.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-toggle-event
crates.description: Cockpit toggle-event log — operator-signed append-only record of every dashboard toggle / feature flip / mode boolean change. Used by replay engine to reconstruct UI state and by audit to track operator-driven configuration shifts.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-toggle-tray
crates.description: Cockpit operator-facing feature toggle tray — categorized on/off switches the operator flips. UI surface only; signed audit lives in selfdef-toggle-audit-authority. Operator groups toggles by category + searches by label.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-toolbar-overflow
crates.description: Cockpit toolbar overflow state. Given an ordered list of toolbar items with per-item priority + width, and a measured container width, partitions items into 'visible' and 'overflow' such that highest-priority items stay visible up to the budget. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tooltip-catalog
crates.description: Cockpit tooltip catalog — registry of tooltips keyed by element_id with text + placement (top/right/bottom/left) + delay_ms. Operator can override or disable any tooltip. Pure UX surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tooltip-delay
crates.description: Cockpit tooltip appearance/disappearance delay tracker with group-cooling. enter(now)/leave(now)/anchor_hidden() event transitions; visible(now) returns true once dwell exceeds open_delay_ms. After a tooltip closes, the group enters a brief cool window (cool_ms) during which subsequent tooltips open with open_delay_ms=0 (sticky-show). Pure timing primitive.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-trash-buffer
crates.description: Soft-delete trash buffer with TTL-based purge + undo.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tree-view
crates.description: Cockpit tree-view state. Hierarchical node tree with expand/collapse per parent, single-selection cursor, and a flat visible-row projection (parent → its visible descendants) suitable for direct virtualized list rendering. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-trend-bar
crates.description: Segmented trend bar — proportional segment widths from labelled counts.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-tri-state-checkbox
crates.description: Tri-state checkbox — Checked / Unchecked / Indeterminate with parent rollup.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-turn-annotation
crates.description: Runtime cockpit per-turn annotations — operator-applied notes / highlights / stars on individual conversation turns. Purely UX/display data with no IPS authority dimension; selfdef sees them only as opaque payload in trace spans.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-type-to-confirm
crates.description: Type-to-confirm input gate for destructive actions.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-typeahead
crates.description: Cockpit typeahead/autocomplete state. Ranked candidate list keyed off the operator's current query, with active-index navigation (up/down with wrap), commit-on-enter behavior, and cancel-on-escape. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-typing-indicator
crates.description: Cockpit typing indicator — purely-visual chat-style 'X is typing…' state used while a model is producing a turn. Auto-clears after configurable timeout. Pure UX with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-typography-scale
crates.description: Cockpit typography scale — per-element type sizes (h1/h2/h3/h4/h5/h6/body/caption) at the operator's chosen scale (Tight / Default / Generous). Pure visual UX with no IPS authority dimension.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-undo-redo-stack
crates.description: Undo/redo command stack with branching on new edit after undo.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-undo-stack
crates.description: Cockpit undo stack — bounded LIFO of reversible operator actions (toggle flip, mode switch, bookmark add/remove, prompt-template add). Each action declares (kind, reverse_payload, performed_at, performed_by). Capacity-capped at 100; oldest dropped on overflow.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-unread-dot
crates.description: Per-channel unread-indicator dot with count and last-seen markers.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-unsaved-guard
crates.description: Cockpit unsaved-changes guard. mark_dirty(scope_id)/mark_clean(scope_id); navigate(scope_id) returns Allow/BlockConfirm{scope_id} when the operator tries to navigate away from a dirty scope; force_navigate clears + allows. Pure descriptor; the chrome wires beforeunload + route guards.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-update-prompt
crates.description: App-update prompt with snooze + install actions.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-upload-progress
crates.description: Per-file upload state — Queued/Uploading/Done/Failed/Cancelled.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-usage-meter
crates.description: Multi-metric usage display with over-limit flagging.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-validation-summary
crates.description: Form validation roll-up: field errors → overall pass/fail.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-view-mode-toggle
crates.description: Per-screen view-mode toggle (List/Grid/Card) with default fallback.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-views
crates.description: E0496 §10 — the 7 things the cockpit MUST show (what is running / what it costs / what it can touch / what it changed / what is waiting for approval / what can be resumed / what can be rolled back). 'Fullstack here is not marketing UI. It is cockpit design.'

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-vim-mode-indicator
crates.description: Cockpit vim-style mode indicator state. 5 modes (Normal/Insert/Visual/Command/Replace) with a pending command buffer and an operator-pending counter. emits the current Status Display for a status-line widget. Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-virtual-grid
crates.description: Cockpit 2D virtualized grid viewport. Given total rows × cols + fixed cell dims + viewport scroll position, compute the (first_row, first_col, row_count, col_count) of visible cells with optional overscan. Pure UX descriptor (analogue of virtual-list in 2D).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-virtual-list
crates.description: Cockpit virtual list state — for long lists (audit log, trace stream, conversation history), tracks (total_items, first_visible_index, viewport_height_px, row_height_px) so the cockpit renders only visible rows. Pure UX paging state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-virtual-tree-window
crates.description: Virtualized tree window: visible row range over a flattened tree.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-volume-meter
crates.description: Audio level meter with peak hold + decay.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-watchlist
crates.description: Cockpit watchlist for operator-watched items. add(item_id, kind, notify_mode); remove; items_for_notify(mode) returns items watched at ≥ mode threshold. Notify modes: Off/InApp/InAppAndPush/All. Pure descriptor; the notifier reads watch state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-whats-new-feed
crates.description: Release-notes/what's-new feed with per-user read state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-widget-registry
crates.description: Cockpit widget registry. Each widget has (id, kind, title, enabled, min_w, min_h). Used by the dashboard layout to decide which tiles are renderable, the user-facing toggle UI to enable/disable individual widgets, and the layout placer to reserve enough room. Pure descriptor; pairs with sovereign-dashboard-layout (placement) and sovereign-dashboard-toggle (visibility).

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-window-position
crates.description: Cockpit window position persistence — multi-monitor (x, y, width, height, monitor_id, maximized, fullscreen). Operator-set; the cockpit restores at launch. Pure UX state.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-wizard-flow
crates.description: Wizard flow with branching steps and per-step validity gates.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-word-count
crates.description: Word / character / reading-time counters for editor surface.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-workspace-state
crates.description: Workspace layout snapshot (panes + active + scroll offsets) with save/load.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-workspace-switcher
crates.description: Multi-workspace switcher with recents and pinned ordering.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-zoom-level
crates.description: Cockpit zoom level — discrete operator zoom (75% / 100% / 125% / 150% / 200%). Pure visual UX with no IPS authority dimension; the cockpit multiplies typography + widget sizes by the zoom factor.

crates.name: sovereign-cockpit-zoom-pan-canvas
crates.description: Cockpit free-zoom + pan canvas state (continuous zoom factor, not discrete steps). Captures camera (cx, cy) in world coords + scale; convert_world_to_screen / convert_screen_to_world helpers; zoom bounds + pan no-clamp (canvas is infinite). Pure UX descriptor.

crates.name: sovereign-codegen-pipeline
crates.description: E0216 — Generated Code Path: the 7-step pipeline (propose → validate-caps → run-in-tier → capture-io → validate-schema → attach-trace → commit-or-reject) and the 5-rung promotion ladder (ad-hoc → sandboxed-script → tested-tool → WASM-plugin → trusted-primitive), with ordered advance + no-skip promotion.

crates.name: sovereign-cognitive-compiler
crates.description: M025 Cognitive Compiler — intent to DAG. 7-input / 5-output typed compile contract + 7-field DAG node schema + 8-axis ready-node scheduler per E0230-E0237 + M00410-M00416 + dump 7000-7378. Doctrine: 'AI intent → compiler → executable cognitive DAG → scheduler → experts/tools → observations → adaptive recompile' (E0230 dump 7026-7030).

crates.name: sovereign-community-detect
crates.description: Graph community detection by label propagation: each node iteratively adopts the most common label among its neighbours until the partition stabilizes, finding densely-connected groups in near-linear time, plus a modularity score to judge the partition's quality. For clustering a knowledge graph into communities (GraphRAG) and grouping related entities or documents.

crates.name: sovereign-completion-cache
crates.description: An LRU cache for model completions keyed by (prompt, params): identical deterministic requests hit the cache instead of re-running the model, so repeats cost nothing — the cheapest form of $0 inference. Tracks hit/miss stats and bounds memory by evicting the least-recently-used entry.

crates.name: sovereign-complexity
crates.description: Request-complexity estimation for cost-aware routing: scores a prompt's difficulty from length, lexical diversity, reasoning markers, technical markers, and question count, and maps the score to a tier (trivial/simple/moderate/complex) — so a runtime can send easy work to a cheap local model and reserve the expensive path for hard requests. The estimator behind complexity-routed, \$0-target inference.

crates.name: sovereign-confidence-calibration
crates.description: Confidence calibration for model outputs: temperature scaling (fit a single temperature that minimizes negative log-likelihood) plus calibration diagnostics — Expected Calibration Error and Brier score. So a runtime can trust, threshold, or abstain on predicted probabilities instead of taking raw softmax confidence at face value.

crates.name: sovereign-config-resolver
crates.description: E0476 / M00827 — Configuration Continuity: the 7 layered config types (hardware/os/runtime/policy/workflow/user/project) resolved per action by precedence, encoding the 5 conflict-resolution rules. 'The runtime resolves these layers per action … that prevents flexibility from becoming chaos.'

crates.name: sovereign-consistent-hash
crates.description: Consistent hashing with virtual nodes: map keys (requests, cache shards, sessions) to nodes on a hash ring so that adding or removing a node only relocates a small fraction of keys, not the whole keyspace. For sharding KV cache and routing requests across workers with minimal reshuffling.

crates.name: sovereign-context-budget
crates.description: Context-window budgeting: counts a text's tokens with the runtime tokenizer and trims it to fit a token budget, keeping the head or the tail. The bookkeeping that stops an agent's growing prompt from overflowing the model's context. Composes sovereign-tokenizer.

crates.name: sovereign-context-pack
crates.description: Optimal context assembly under a token budget: pick the subset of candidate chunks that maximizes total relevance while their token counts fit the budget, via 0/1 knapsack dynamic programming. Beats greedy truncation when chunks vary in length and value — the right way to pack a retrieval context window.

crates.name: sovereign-continuity-levels
crates.description: E0456 — the 8-level continuity ladder (Level 0 stateless API call … Level 7 user-sovereign life continuity). Cloud typically provides 0-2; the sovereign station owns 3-7 — 'For real work, continuity is intelligence.'

crates.name: sovereign-continuity-manager
crates.description: M048 Module 8 Continuity Manager — sleeper module per E0464 + M00810 dump 14706-14720. 6 primitives (ZFS snapshots / Podman-CRIU checkpoints / workflow hibernation / context compaction / model server warm pools / session resume) + 8 continuity states (active/paused/hibernated/checkpointed/archived/quarantined/promoted/rolled-back).

crates.name: sovereign-continuous-batch
crates.description: Continuous (in-flight) batching scheduler for LLM serving: admit waiting requests as KV blocks and batch slots free up, decode all running sequences a token per step, and preempt sequences back to the queue under memory pressure so the GPU stays busy without deadlocking. Composes sovereign-paged-kv.

crates.name: sovereign-control-word
crates.description: M002 control-word injected logic — a 64-bit control word per branch packing opcode + precision selector + flags + operand into typed bitfields. The deterministic bit-level microcode that gates each branch's behavior; exact encode/decode.

crates.name: sovereign-control-word-service
crates.description: M002 service layer for the control-word round engine: per-lane DNA fingerprints (FNV-1a, dependency-free per the replay-ledger precedent), quarantine on fingerprint drift, forward/rewind round replay, hand-rolled Prometheus text metrics, and pre/post lifecycle events. Wraps the safe sovereign-simd round API — this crate itself forbids unsafe.

crates.name: sovereign-conversation-fork-event
crates.description: Runtime conversation-fork event log — operator forks a conversation at a given turn_index to a new branch_id. Each fork carries (parent_branch, new_branch, fork_at_turn, actor, trace_id, at). The replay engine reconstructs the tree.

crates.name: sovereign-conversation-search-index
crates.description: Runtime conversation search index — substring + role + branch filter over ConversationThread turns. Indexes a set of threads at registry time and answers operator queries from the cockpit search bar.

crates.name: sovereign-conversation-thread
crates.description: Runtime conversation thread schema — operator/model/tool turn-by-turn record with token accounting, role tagging, branch ids, and provider provenance. The cockpit replays threads from disk; the daemon emits one record per turn into the M049 trace + the audit log.

crates.name: sovereign-cortex
crates.description: Sovereign cortex — the first runnable assembly that composes the real engine crates into one request pipeline: 7-axis router (role) -> SRP scheduler (hardware-capability placement) -> Memory OS (recall feeds evidence) -> Value Plane PRM critic (commit/expand/prune). Provides the `sovereign-cortex` binary.

crates.name: sovereign-count-min
crates.description: Count-Min Sketch for streaming frequency estimation in sublinear space: count item occurrences over an unbounded stream with a fixed grid of counters, trading exactness for memory — estimates never undercount and stay within a tunable error of the true frequency. For frequency-penalized sampling and heavy-hitter tracking without storing per-item counts.

crates.name: sovereign-cpu-dispatch
crates.description: E0490 — CPU Feature Dispatch: the 4 build dispatch paths (scalar baseline / AVX2 / AVX-512 generic / Zen5 AVX-512) and runtime-CPUID selection of the best path the host supports. 'Do not compile one binary and hope.'

crates.name: sovereign-cpu-pinning
crates.description: Emit systemd AllowedCPUs= resource-control drop-ins that pin the Trinity CPU agents (Pulse / Weaver+Auditor / System-Host) to their CCD cores, from the single-source-of-truth sovereign-cpu-topology partition (E0672-E0674). The CPU-affinity counterpart to sovereign-resource-control's weight/limit drop-ins.

crates.name: sovereign-cpu-topology
crates.description: M070 — dual-CCD cache topology + core pinning. The 2 CCDs (cores/threads/L3) and the 3 SRP-Trinity core allocations (Pulse / Weaver+Auditor / System-Host) with their thread masks, plus partition validation and cgroup-v2 cpuset emission for CCD-aware scheduling.

crates.name: sovereign-crdt
crates.description: State-based conflict-free replicated data types (CvRDTs): a grow-only counter, a PN-counter, a last-writer-wins register, and an observed-remove set, each with a merge that is commutative, associative, and idempotent so independent replicas converge to the same state with no coordination or conflict resolution. For distributed state that syncs across nodes by exchanging and merging snapshots.

crates.name: sovereign-cuckoo-filter
crates.description: Cuckoo filter: approximate set membership that, unlike a Bloom filter, supports deletion — stores small fingerprints in a cuckoo-hash table with two candidate buckets per item and relocates on collision. For sliding-window 'seen recently' sets where items must expire, with a tunable false-positive rate and no false negatives for present items.

crates.name: sovereign-cusum
crates.description: CUSUM change-point detection: a two-sided cumulative-sum monitor that raises an alarm when a metric stream drifts persistently above or below its target, while ignoring ordinary noise. For watching latency, acceptance rate, or output quality and reacting when behavior shifts.

crates.name: sovereign-dag-schedule
crates.description: Dependency-graph scheduling for tasks and tool calls: Kahn topological ordering with cycle detection, parallel-wave levelling (which tasks may run concurrently), and weighted critical-path / makespan analysis. Turns a DAG of 'X must finish before Y' constraints into a runnable plan — the ordering layer for agent task graphs and tool pipelines. Distinct from ranking or shortest-path graph algorithms.

crates.name: sovereign-dashboard-coverage
crates.description: Coverage check for M060 21-dashboard catalog (D-00..D-20). Walks webapp/ and verifies every catalogued D-NN slot has either a dedicated dashboard or a documented alias to an existing surface.

crates.name: sovereign-dashboard-layout
crates.description: Runtime dashboard widget-grid layout — per dashboard slot (D-NN) declares a 12-column grid of widgets (x/y/w/h/widget-kind). Detects overlap + out-of-bounds at validation time. Composes sovereign-dashboard-coverage for slot identity.

crates.name: sovereign-dashboard-snapshot
crates.description: Runtime dashboard snapshot — point-in-time serializable capture of cockpit composite state: BannerState + ContextPanel + ToastTray + live mode/bundle. Operators export it for incident reports; replay loads it as a starting state.

crates.name: sovereign-dashboard-toggle
crates.description: Per-dashboard visibility/toggle infrastructure per M060 R10038 + R10129-R10132 operator standing direction 'everything can be turned on and off'. Toggle state persisted under /etc/sovereign-os/dashboards.toml, signed via selfdef MS003, every change emits M049 trace + OCSF Configuration Change (class 5001). Composes with the 21-dashboard catalog from sovereign-dashboard-coverage.

crates.name: sovereign-data-plane
crates.description: M010 deterministic data plane — a Roaring-style compressed bitmap (CRoaring reference): u32 keys partitioned into array/bitmap containers by high 16 bits, auto-converting sparse↔dense, with union/intersection/cardinality. The deterministic set substrate for fast metadata filtering.

crates.name: sovereign-ddsketch
crates.description: DDSketch relative-error quantile sketch: maps each value to a logarithmically-spaced bucket so any quantile is answered with a guaranteed relative error (e.g. 1%), in memory bounded by the value range, not the sample count. Mergeable across shards and accurate deep into the tail (p99, p999) where fixed-bucket histograms and P-squared lose resolution — the standard sketch for latency observability.

crates.name: sovereign-decode-loop
crates.description: The transformer decode inner loop, assembled from the real primitives: RoPE rotates the query/keys by position, attention mixes the values over the growing KV cache, a linear head projects the context to logits, and the sampler draws the next token — one reproducible step end to end. Composes sovereign-rope, sovereign-attention, and sovereign-sampler.

crates.name: sovereign-decoder-layer
crates.description: A uniform DecoderLayer contract over the decoder-block family (f32 transformer-block, precision-selectable quant-block, multi-head GQA mha-block) plus a heterogeneous LayerStack runner — so one model can mix precisions and head layouts per layer, the mixed-precision assignment quant-calibration recommends. Composes sovereign-transformer-block, sovereign-quant-block, and sovereign-mha-block.

crates.name: sovereign-decoder-stack
crates.description: A complete decoder-only transformer model: token embedding -> N stacked pre-norm decoder blocks (each with its own KV cache) -> final RMSNorm -> output head -> logits -> sampler, with prompt ingestion and autoregressive generation. The end-to-end tiny LLM runtime that ties the whole decode-engine arc together. Composes sovereign-transformer-block, sovereign-rmsnorm, and sovereign-sampler.

crates.name: sovereign-degeneration
crates.description: Generation-degeneration detection: flags the loop/repeat collapse that decoding can fall into, by measuring the longest repeated substring (via a suffix array), the distinct-n-gram ratio (rep-n), and the fraction of text covered by repeats. A runtime quality gate for catching degenerate output. Composes sovereign-suffix-array.

crates.name: sovereign-diversity
crates.description: Measure the diversity of a set of generations: distinct-n (fraction of unique n-grams across outputs), Self-BLEU (how much each output overlaps the others — lower is more diverse), and the unique-output ratio. For detecting mode collapse and tuning sampling temperature. Composes sovereign-text-eval.

crates.name: sovereign-doctrinal-preservation
crates.description: Composite verbatim doctrine registry — aggregates every doctrine string emitted by the sovereign-os runtime/cockpit crates. Counterpart to selfdef-doctrinal-preservation on the IPS side. Per operator standing direction 'you cannot invent crap' + verbatim preservation requirements throughout the M0NN catalog.

crates.name: sovereign-doctrine-citation
crates.description: Runtime doctrine-citation envelope — every dispatched workload + mode transition + replay session cites at least one of the 16 sovereign doctrines from sovereign-doctrinal-preservation. The cockpit renders the citation tag chip alongside every operator-visible decision.

crates.name: sovereign-dry-sampler
crates.description: DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself) repetition sampler: penalizes the next token in proportion to the length of the repeated sequence it would extend, with an exponentially growing penalty above an allowed match length, and configurable sequence-breaker tokens that reset matching. Unlike a flat repetition penalty or a hard n-gram ban, it targets exactly the token that continues a loop — suppressing degenerate repetition while leaving legitimate reuse untouched.

crates.name: sovereign-edit-align
crates.description: Edit-distance alignment: the dynamic program that returns the actual minimal edit script — match / substitute / insert / delete operations with their positions — between two sequences, not just the distance. For diff highlighting, spelling-correction display, and word-error-rate breakdowns.

crates.name: sovereign-edit-distance
crates.description: Levenshtein edit distance and fuzzy matching: distance, a normalized similarity ratio, nearest-candidate selection, and a 'did you mean' suggestion within a threshold. The fuzzy-match utility for correcting a model's misspelled tool/command names against a known set.

crates.name: sovereign-embed
crates.description: Subword embeddings via character n-gram feature hashing: maps text to a fixed-dimension dense vector by hashing its char n-grams (with word boundaries) into signed buckets and L2-normalizing, so morphologically related words land close in cosine space — semantic-ish retrieval that the exact-term lexical retriever misses. Includes an EmbedStore for cosine top-k retrieval.

crates.name: sovereign-environment-maps
crates.description: M042 MAP doctrine — 'Do not let agents learn the environment only by failing through it. Build a map first.' Seven environment maps (repo/test/tool/risk/memory/GUI-world/dependency) per R07014-R07020 + M00704 + dump 12175-12189. Pre-loaded map data so agents work from knowledge, not blind exploration.

crates.name: sovereign-eval-plane
crates.description: M048 Module 7 Eval/Value Plane — 10-dimension scoring + 8-profile weighting per E0464 + M00809 dump 14682-14702. Per-run eval surface that feeds M046 LoRA adapter promotion (eval-gate >= 80) + M027 value-plane reward axis aggregation. Sister to selfdef-trust-score-mirror IPS-side trust scoring.

crates.name: sovereign-eval-result-summary
crates.description: Runtime eval-suite result envelope — single-run summary (suite_id, started_at, finished_at, total cases, passing, failing, per-dimension averages). The cockpit displays this on the eval tile + the dispatcher gates next-action on `pass_rate`.

crates.name: sovereign-eval-suite-catalog
crates.description: Runtime eval-suite catalog — operator-curated evaluation suites the eval-plane can dispatch (smoke / regression / safety / drift / golden-path / red-team / latency-budget). Each suite declares (id, dimensions, required-mode, expected-runtime-seconds). Composes sovereign-eval-plane + sovereign-execution-mode-registry.

crates.name: sovereign-execution-env
crates.description: E0553 — Execute + Observe (lifecycle steps 7-8): the 9 bounded execution environments (model server / REPL / shell / container / VM / browser / memory service / symbolic planner / policy engine) with isolation levels, and the 10 observation categories that are ground truth for the workflow.

crates.name: sovereign-execution-mode-registry
crates.description: Runtime execution-mode registry — Plan / DryRun / Shadow / Sandbox / Execute / Replay / Debug. Each mode declares (writes-allowed, network-allowed, snapshot-required, replay-source-required) so the cockpit can render the active mode badge + the dispatcher can refuse incompatible operations.

crates.name: sovereign-feature-selftest
crates.description: Per-feature LIVE self-tests for the Feature Test Lab cockpit panel — the operator exercises each shipped feature and observes result / path-taken / timing / checks as JSON. Not unit tests: each self-test runs the real feature (e.g. the AVX-512 sum_of_squares kernel) and reports what actually happened. Modeled on the sovereign-telemetry probe (JSON on stdout, graceful, exit 0).

crates.name: sovereign-fenwick
crates.description: Fenwick tree (binary indexed tree) for O(log n) prefix sums with O(log n) point updates, plus cumulative-weight search for sampling from a distribution whose weights change — the dynamic counterpart to a static alias table. For frequency-penalized sampling, running rank/quantile queries, and any weighted draw over an evolving frequency table.

crates.name: sovereign-ffn
crates.description: SwiGLU feed-forward network: the gated MLP that follows attention in every modern transformer block — two parallel up-projections, one passed through SiLU and used to gate the other, then a down-projection back to model width. The position-wise non-linearity half of a transformer block.

crates.name: sovereign-format-mask
crates.description: Format-constrained decoding for byte-level models: a positional pattern of character classes (digits, letters, literals, custom sets) that yields the allowed next byte-tokens given how much has been generated, so output is forced to match a fixed structure (dates, ids, codes). Stateful grammar-lite decoding distinct from the static allow-list; pairs with the logit mask.

crates.name: sovereign-fs-boundary
crates.description: E0123 / M00231 — Filesystem Boundary: the /ai-exchange/{inbox,outbox,artifacts} exchange directories and the host import-validation pipeline (parse / scan / diff / policy-check / oracle-review-if-needed / commit).

crates.name: sovereign-gateway
crates.description: M048 Module 4 Anthropic-first gateway per E0462 + M00806 + dump 14584-14610. 6 surfaces (Anthropic Messages API / OpenAI shim / MCP bridge / Claude Code / OpenCode-Cline / cost+route ledger) + 7-responsibility provider-inversion ownership. Doctrine: 'Instead of tools owning provider keys: client → Sovereign Gateway → local/cloud/model router.'

crates.name: sovereign-gatewayd
crates.description: The first persistent runnable service: promotes the one-shot sovereign-cortex engine into a long-lived daemon behind the M048 Module 4 sovereign-gateway contract. Newline-delimited JSON over TCP/stdio; one process-wide learning Cortex (memory persists + learns across requests, M016); a live cost/route ledger (gateway surface 6); the never-cloud-spill safety invariant tracked as a process tripwire. Doctrine: 'client → Sovereign Gateway → local/cloud/model router'. Provides the `sovereign-gatewayd` binary.

crates.name: sovereign-graph-path
crates.description: Shortest paths over a graph: Dijkstra for non-negative weighted edges and BFS for unweighted, returning the path and its cost plus single-source distances. For multi-hop reasoning over a knowledge graph — finding how two entities are connected and the cheapest route between them (GraphRAG path queries).

crates.name: sovereign-gumbel
crates.description: Gumbel-max sampling from raw logits: adding i.i.d. Gumbel noise and taking the argmax draws a category exactly from the softmax of the logits, with no explicit normalization — and taking the top-k instead draws k distinct categories without replacement (the Gumbel-top-k trick). Seeded and deterministic, for categorical sampling and diverse parallel draws.

crates.name: sovereign-hardware-dispatch-eligibility
crates.description: Runtime hardware dispatch eligibility — for a workload request (VRAM-needed + latency-tier + role-required) computes which of the 5 hardware targets are currently eligible, given live load + thermal headroom. The SRP scheduler picks from the eligible set; the cockpit shows it for transparency.

crates.name: sovereign-hardware-load-sample
crates.description: Runtime hardware load sample — per-target VRAM-used / compute-util / thermal snapshot the SRP scheduler consumes and the cockpit dashboard renders. Keyed to the 5 HardwareTargets in sovereign-hardware-registry.

crates.name: sovereign-hardware-registry
crates.description: Runtime hardware registry — 5-tier catalog (CPU/RDNA-4090/Blackwell/Cloud/None) carrying vram + role + latency-tier so the SRP scheduler + router can dispatch deterministically. Mirrors selfdef HardwareTarget discriminator surface.

crates.name: sovereign-hardware-thermal-policy
crates.description: Runtime per-target thermal policy — for each of the 5 hardware targets, declares warn / throttle / shutdown thresholds in °C, and emits a ThermalVerdict (Cool/Warm/Throttle/Shutdown) given a live temp_c reading. The SRP scheduler uses the verdict to gate dispatch; the cockpit dashboard tints the hardware tile.

crates.name: sovereign-harness-layers
crates.description: M082 — the 5-layer TDD test pyramid (schema/lint -> unit -> stage-acceptance -> integration -> hardware-conformance): per-layer virtualization needs, CI trigger gating (every-PR / merge-or-label / operator-local), test-directory classification, and the flake-retry policy, from E0788-E0794 / F06836-F06898.

crates.name: sovereign-heavy-hitters
crates.description: Approximate top-k frequent items over a stream: a Count-Min Sketch counts every item in fixed memory while a bounded heap keeps the k highest-frequency keys seen, so you get the heavy hitters of an unbounded stream without storing it all. For finding the most-frequent tokens or n-grams. Composes sovereign-count-min.

crates.name: sovereign-hf-tokenizer
crates.description: Loads a HuggingFace `tokenizer.json` (GPT-2 byte-level BPE: explicit vocab + ranked merges + byte↔unicode map) and provides faithful encode/decode, so the sovereign quant runtime can run REAL trained models (Llama/SmolLM-family) instead of only the 256-vocab byte tokenizer. Pure Rust + serde_json — no external tokenizer, regex, or sentencepiece dependency (sovereignty-clean).

crates.name: sovereign-hibernation
crates.description: E0453 — Hibernated Thought: the 6 wait conditions an agent hibernates on (user / long-test / download / external-event / low-priority / memory-pressure) and the 5 fields the runtime saves to hibernate-and-resume (branch summary / state vector / tool futures / context refs / next wake condition).

crates.name: sovereign-histogram
crates.description: A bucketed histogram for latency/size distributions: record values into configurable buckets in constant memory and query percentiles (p50/p95/p99) and bucket counts. The percentile companion to running-stats — what you watch for SLOs, not just the mean.

crates.name: sovereign-hnsw
crates.description: Approximate nearest-neighbour search by Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) graphs: a layered proximity graph giving logarithmic-time vector search with high recall, the index behind production vector databases. For semantic retrieval over millions of embeddings — RAG, deduplication, and similarity lookup — without the linear cost of brute-force scanning.

crates.name: sovereign-holderpo
crates.description: M078 HölderPO + GRPO post-training pipeline per arXiv 2605.12058. Hölder-mean token-level probability aggregation + dynamic-p annealing schedule. 54.9% avg math accuracy + 93.8% ALFWorld benchmark targets.

crates.name: sovereign-holt-winters
crates.description: Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing for forecasting: tracks a series' level, trend, and additive seasonal cycle with three smoothing constants, then projects them forward any number of steps. For predicting load to drive autoscaling and capacity planning — anticipating the daily/weekly demand curve instead of reacting to it. Supports batch fitting and online updates.

crates.name: sovereign-hrm-runtime
crates.description: M080 HRM (Hierarchical Reasoning Model) runtime — 4th architectural class beyond Transformer/Mamba/BitNet, per arXiv 2506.21734 + sapientinc/HRM-Text-1B. Two-timescale recurrent: high-level slow planner + low-level fast computer. 27M-1.18B params, single forward pass without CoT supervision.

crates.name: sovereign-huffman
crates.description: Huffman coding over u32 symbols: build the optimal prefix-free code from symbol frequencies, then encode a token sequence into a bit-packed buffer and decode it back exactly. Gives the minimum expected code length for a known distribution — for compressing token streams and measuring their entropy.

crates.name: sovereign-hyperloglog
crates.description: HyperLogLog cardinality estimation: count the number of distinct items in a stream using a few kilobytes regardless of how many there are, with a relative error around 1.04/sqrt(m). With small-range linear-counting correction and mergeable sketches — for tracking distinct-token / distinct-n-gram counts (vocabulary growth, output diversity) without storing the set.

crates.name: sovereign-inference-demo
crates.description: A runnable end-to-end demonstration of the sovereign quantized inference stack: assembles a byte-level BPE tokenizer and a mixed-precision (f32 + ternary + NVFP4 multi-head) decoder model, then runs unconstrained and constrained text generation, printing the whole pipeline. The `sovereign-inference-demo` binary that proves the engine runs.

crates.name: sovereign-inheritance-artifacts
crates.description: M042 8 inheritance artifacts per M00712 + R07137-R07139 + dump 12494-12515. Companion to sovereign-inheritance-contracts (Symphony's 6 contracts); this crate enumerates the 8 durable artifacts the operator-conversation seeds. Doctrine: 'this is how the conversation becomes executable memory' (E0406).

crates.name: sovereign-inheritance-check
crates.description: Emit the canonical M042 8-artifact durable-inheritance manifest (VISION/ARCHITECTURE/METHODOLOGY/PROFILES/POLICY/MODEL_REGISTRY/HARDWARE_PROFILES/EVALS) and verify the files exist under a target root, from the single-source-of-truth sovereign-inheritance-artifacts crate. The box's executable memory, made checkable.

crates.name: sovereign-inheritance-contracts
crates.description: M042 Symphony 6-contract typed schema per M00705 + F03509-F03515 dump 12194-12201. Six version-controlled repo artifacts (SPEC.md / WORKFLOW.md / PROFILES.yaml / EVALS.yaml / POLICY.yaml / MODEL_REGISTRY.yaml). Doctrine: 'Workflow belongs in version-controlled repo artifacts' (F03509).

crates.name: sovereign-injection-detect
crates.description: Heuristic prompt-injection / jailbreak detection: scans user input for known override patterns ('ignore previous instructions', 'you are now', 'developer mode', system-prompt leaks) and returns a risk score plus the matched patterns, so a runtime can gate, flag, or escalate a suspicious request. A first-line safety filter, not a guarantee.

crates.name: sovereign-intake
crates.description: E0549 — Step 1 Intake of the task lifecycle: the 10 task sources (Claude Code / Cline / OpenCode / dashboard / CLI / MCP / API / scheduled / file-watcher / voice) and the 6 fields the gateway creates per request (request_id / trace_id / client_id / profile_hint / privacy_context / budget_hint). trace_id is the sovereign-trace-context id.

crates.name: sovereign-interval-schedule
crates.description: Interval scheduling: choose the maximum-weight set of non-overlapping intervals by the classic sort-by-finish dynamic program (with binary search for the latest compatible job), and the maximum-count set by the earliest-finish greedy. For admitting the most valuable non-conflicting jobs onto a single resource — a GPU timeline, a reservation calendar, an exclusive lock window.

crates.name: sovereign-interval-tree
crates.description: Interval tree for overlap and point-stabbing queries: from a set of intervals, find all that contain a point or overlap a query range in output-sensitive time via a center-point recursive structure. For reservation and scheduling conflict detection, time-window lookups, and range tagging — distinct from a segment tree, which aggregates over index ranges rather than querying arbitrary intervals.

crates.name: sovereign-intervention-class-mirror
crates.description: M079 Intervention-class taxonomy (white-box vs black-box) per arXiv 2604.09839 'Steered LLM Activations are Non-Surjective'. Tracks per-interaction intervention class for eval-protocol separation. Doctrinal preservation: white-box steering NOT evidence of prompt-based vulnerability.

crates.name: sovereign-isotonic
crates.description: Isotonic regression by the pool-adjacent-violators algorithm: fit the monotonic (non-decreasing or non-increasing) step function that minimizes weighted squared error to a set of points, in linear time after sorting. The non-parametric counterpart to temperature scaling for probability calibration — it bends a model's scores into trustworthy probabilities without assuming a shape — and a general tool for enforcing a known monotonic relationship.

crates.name: sovereign-ivf
crates.description: Inverted-file (IVF) approximate nearest-neighbour index: a k-means coarse quantizer partitions the vector space into Voronoi cells, each vector lands in a posting list, and a query scans only the few cells nearest its centroid (n_probe). The cluster-based counterpart to graph-based HNSW and the front half of IVF-PQ — sub-linear semantic search that trades a tunable slice of recall for large speedups over brute force.

crates.name: sovereign-ivf-pq
crates.description: IVF-PQ (IVFADC) billion-scale approximate nearest-neighbour index: a k-means coarse quantizer partitions vectors into cells, the residual of each vector from its cell centroid is product-quantized to a few bytes, and queries scan the n_probe nearest cells using asymmetric distance computation over precomputed lookup tables. Stores compressed codes instead of full vectors — the FAISS-style method for vector search at memory scales brute force and HNSW cannot reach. Composes sovereign-kmeans and sovereign-product-quantization.

crates.name: sovereign-jaro-winkler
crates.description: Jaro and Jaro-Winkler string similarity: a transposition-aware match score in [0,1] that rewards shared characters within a sliding window and boosts strings sharing a common prefix. Strong on short strings and names where edit distance is coarse — a complement to Levenshtein for fuzzy matching and ranking.

crates.name: sovereign-json-extract
crates.description: Robust JSON extraction from model output: scans text for the first balanced JSON object or array — correctly ignoring braces inside strings and escapes — and returns its span or parses it to a serde_json Value. The boundary that turns a model's prose-wrapped JSON (tool arguments, structured answers) into usable data.

crates.name: sovereign-json-repair
crates.description: Repair the malformed JSON that language models emit: strip markdown code fences and surrounding prose, drop trailing commas, and close unclosed strings, objects, and arrays — turning best-effort model output into parseable JSON. A tolerant pre-parse pass for structured generation.

crates.name: sovereign-json-schema-grammar
crates.description: Compiles a JSON-Schema subset into a context-free grammar so a generator can be constrained to emit only schema-conforming JSON. Objects with fixed ordered keys, arrays, strings, numbers/integers, booleans, null, and string enums become an Earley-checkable grammar — the structured-output / function-calling use of grammar-constrained decoding, built on sovereign-cfg-grammar.

crates.name: sovereign-jsonl
crates.description: JSON Lines (newline-delimited JSON) reading and writing: parse one JSON value per line tolerantly (skipping blanks, reporting bad lines), serialize values back to JSONL, and a streaming reader that buffers partial chunks across reads. For ingesting eval datasets and emitting structured, append-friendly logs.

crates.name: sovereign-kalman
crates.description: Scalar Kalman filter (local-level model): tracks a noisy quantity by optimally fusing a prediction with each measurement, weighting them by their variances so the estimate is smooth when measurements are noisy and responsive when they are trustworthy. For online estimation of latency, throughput, or any drifting setpoint from jittery samples — with a uncertainty estimate alongside the value.

crates.name: sovereign-keywords
crates.description: RAKE-style keyword extraction: pulls the most salient keyphrases from a document by splitting on stopwords into candidate phrases and scoring each by its words' degree-over-frequency. The tagging/indexing primitive for routing and surfacing documents — deterministic and dependency-free.

crates.name: sovereign-kmeans
crates.description: K-means clustering (Lloyd's algorithm) with k-means++ seeding over f32 vectors: partition points into k clusters by iteratively assigning each to its nearest centroid and recomputing centroids, reporting assignments, centroids, and inertia. Seeded and deterministic — for clustering embeddings, building quantization codebooks, and semantic grouping.

crates.name: sovereign-knapsack
crates.description: Knapsack selection under a capacity budget: 0/1 knapsack by dynamic programming (each item taken whole or not) returning the maximum-value set, and fractional knapsack by the value-density greedy (items divisible) returning the LP-optimal fill. For choosing the most valuable items that fit a token/memory/cost budget — context packing, cache admission, resource allocation.

crates.name: sovereign-kv-budget
crates.description: KV-cache memory budgeting: computes the bytes a transformer's key/value cache costs for a given model shape, precision, sequence length, and batch — and inverts it to the longest context that fits a memory budget. The capacity-planning calc behind the KV hierarchy (which tier, how long a context, how big a batch).

crates.name: sovereign-kv-cache
crates.description: M011 KV cache as memory hierarchy — a tiered (VRAM/RAM/NVMe) KV-block cache with LRU demotion across tiers, hit-promotion to keep hot prefixes resident, and prefix-reuse measurement. Pure-Rust reference for the native KV-cache controller.

crates.name: sovereign-kv-window
crates.description: A sliding-window KV cache with attention sinks: retains the first N 'sink' tokens plus the most recent W tokens, evicting the middle, so attention memory stays bounded no matter how long generation runs. The bounded-memory attention policy for endless operation (distinct from the tiered VRAM/RAM/NVMe kv-cache, which is about placement). Feeds the attention kernel.

crates.name: sovereign-language-detect
crates.description: Language identification by character n-gram profiles: train a detector on sample text per language, then classify new text by the cosine similarity of its character-trigram frequency vector to each language profile. Self-contained (no bundled models) and deterministic — for routing, filtering, and tagging text by language.

crates.name: sovereign-learning-signals
crates.description: E0555 — Learn (lifecycle step 11): the 7 immediate learning signals (store-trace / update-memory / update-route-stats / add-eval-case / promote-skill / adjust-profile / tag-model-failure) and the 4 deferred LoRA steps, with outcome-driven derivation. 'Continuity is preserving the chain to learning.'

crates.name: sovereign-levenshtein-automaton
crates.description: Levenshtein automaton for fast fuzzy matching: recognizes every string within edit distance k of a pattern by simulating the nondeterministic Levenshtein NFA over position sets, with incremental character stepping so it can be driven down a trie or dictionary and pruned the moment no match remains reachable. The matching engine behind fuzzy search (as in Lucene/Tantivy) — distinct from a pairwise edit-distance DP or a BK-tree.

crates.name: sovereign-line-diff
crates.description: Line-level diffing via longest-common-subsequence: computes the added, removed, and unchanged lines between two texts and renders a unified +/- diff with insertion/deletion counts. The 'what did the agent change' primitive for code- and document-editing workflows.

crates.name: sovereign-linear
crates.description: A precision-generic linear layer: one Linear type that runs y = W.x in dense f32, ternary 1.58-bit BitLinear (multiplication-free), NVFP4 4-bit microscaling, or INT8 VNNI (VPDPBUSD-style), chosen per layer. The bridge that lets the transformer's projections actually run on the quantization kernels instead of plain f32. Composes sovereign-bitlinear-core, sovereign-nvfp4-runtime, and sovereign-vnni.

crates.name: sovereign-llm
crates.description: The end-to-end sovereign LLM runtime: ties the byte-level BPE tokenizer to the decoder-only transformer stack so you can go straight from a text prompt to generated text. tokenizer.encode -> decoder-stack.generate -> tokenizer.decode, deterministic per seed. The runnable text-to-text capstone of the inference engine. Composes sovereign-tokenizer and sovereign-decoder-stack.

crates.name: sovereign-load-balance
crates.description: Smooth weighted round-robin load balancing (nginx's SWRR): distributes requests across weighted backends so the selection matches the weights without bursting all of a heavy backend's turns together. Deterministic. For spreading work across the sovereign devices (Conductor/Logic/Oracle/Cloud) by capacity.

crates.name: sovereign-local-align
crates.description: Smith-Waterman local sequence alignment: finds the single highest-scoring matching subregion between two sequences (not the whole-length alignment of Needleman-Wunsch), returning its score, the span in each sequence, and the edit operations. For locating a quote or citation inside a document, fuzzy substring search, and grounding a generated span back to its source — generic over any comparable token, with a string convenience layer.

crates.name: sovereign-logit-mask
crates.description: Constrained-decoding logit processor: applies an allow-list, ban-list, and per-token logit bias to a logit row before sampling, so generation can be confined to a permitted token set (structured/grammar output) or steered away from forbidden tokens (safety). The decode-control stage that sits between the model head and the sampler.

crates.name: sovereign-logit-pipeline
crates.description: A composable logits-processor pipeline: chains decode-time logit transforms (static allow/ban mask, no-repeat n-gram blocking, custom processors) into one ordered step applied to each position's logits before sampling. The unifying abstraction over the individual generation controls. Composes sovereign-logit-mask and sovereign-no-repeat-ngram.

crates.name: sovereign-logprobs
crates.description: Utilities over token log-probabilities: sequence log-prob, length-normalized scoring (GNMT penalty), perplexity, predictive entropy, top-token confidence margin, and the weakest-token locator for hallucination flagging. The scoring-and-uncertainty layer that reads a model's per-token logprobs.

crates.name: sovereign-lora-foundry
crates.description: M046 LoRA Foundry — 8 candidate adapters per M00774 + dump 13966-13976 + 7-step pipeline + 6-action runtime-decision matrix per E0442. Doctrine: 'Fine-tuning changes weights. Runtime adaptation changes behavior. Runtime adaptation comes first.' (E0438 verbatim) + 'station becomes adapter foundry'.

crates.name: sovereign-lsh
crates.description: Locality-sensitive hashing over MinHash signatures: split each signature into bands, hash each band, and treat items that collide in any band as near-duplicate candidates — so you find similar documents in roughly linear time instead of comparing every pair. The index layer that turns sovereign-minhash signatures into actual deduplication.

crates.name: sovereign-markdown-strip
crates.description: Strip Markdown formatting to plain prose for ingestion: removes headers, list bullets, blockquotes, emphasis and inline-code markers, and code-fence lines (keeping the code), and unwraps links/images to their text — without mangling in-word underscores. The preprocessing step before chunking and indexing a Markdown document.

crates.name: sovereign-matryoshka
crates.description: Matryoshka-representation utilities: truncate a nested embedding to a shorter prefix dimension and renormalize, trading a little accuracy for much smaller storage and faster search, plus coarse-to-fine retrieval (shortlist at low dimension, rerank at full). For adaptive-dimension embedding indexes.

crates.name: sovereign-memory-os
crates.description: M028 Memory OS — 8 memory types (Working/Episodic/Semantic/Procedural/TemporalGraph/Value/KV/Reward) per M00459-M00465 + E0265 + 11-stage admission lifecycle per E0264 + M00471. Doctrine 'Intelligence improves when memory stops being recall and becomes adaptive state' verbatim per E0267 dump 8423-8474.

crates.name: sovereign-merkle-tree
crates.description: Merkle tree over a list of leaves: a single root hash summarizes the whole dataset, audit proofs show a leaf belongs under that root in logarithmic size, and a tree-vs-tree diff finds exactly which leaves differ by descending only where subtree hashes disagree. For verifying and reconciling replicated state (anti-entropy sync) — comparing two snapshots in log time instead of element by element. Uses a self-contained non-cryptographic 64-bit hash.

crates.name: sovereign-mha
crates.description: Multi-head attention with grouped-query (GQA) and multi-query (MQA) support: splits the query into heads, maps each query head onto a shared key/value head group, runs the per-head scaled-dot-product attention, and concatenates. GQA is the KV-cache-saving attention real decoders use; this generalizes the single-head kernel to the head layout a production model runs. Composes sovereign-attention.

crates.name: sovereign-mha-block
crates.description: The production decoder block: multi-head attention with grouped-query (GQA/MQA) KV sharing, per-head RoPE, precision-selectable projections (f32/ternary/NVFP4), and a SwiGLU FFN, in the pre-norm + residual structure. This is the block real models actually run — many query heads, fewer KV heads, low-bit weights. Composes sovereign-mha, sovereign-rope, sovereign-rmsnorm, sovereign-ffn, and sovereign-linear.

crates.name: sovereign-minhash
crates.description: MinHash signatures for fast Jaccard-similarity estimation: reduce a set (e.g. the word shingles of a document) to a fixed-length signature so two sets can be compared in O(signature length) instead of O(set size). For near-duplicate detection — deduping retrieved RAG chunks or training documents — without storing or scanning the full sets.

crates.name: sovereign-mirostat
crates.description: Mirostat v2 adaptive sampling: instead of a fixed top-k/top-p cut, it targets a surprise level (tau) by truncating tokens whose surprise exceeds a running threshold mu and nudging mu after each draw toward the target — keeping output perplexity roughly constant over a generation. A feedback-controlled decoder, distinct from the static sampler.

crates.name: sovereign-mirror-publisher
crates.description: Typed mirror-endpoint manifest for the cockpit (D-12..D-18 dashboards) — enumerates the 9 selfdef-mirror crates, their D-NN dashboard binding, schema versions, and HTTP/SSE endpoints. Per M060 R10114-R10128 + MS043 R10182-R10193 (cross-repo SATURATED set).

crates.name: sovereign-mmr
crates.description: Maximal Marginal Relevance re-ranking: greedily select results that are relevant to the query yet diverse from those already chosen, trading the two off with a lambda parameter. Stops a retrieval-augmented context from filling with near-duplicate passages. Works from a cosine over document vectors or a precomputed similarity matrix.

crates.name: sovereign-mode-default-policy
crates.description: Runtime mode-default policy — declares per-BundleName landing ExecutionMode at cockpit boot. Private lands in Plan; Careful in DryRun; Fast in Execute; Sovereign in Execute. Operator can override per-session.

crates.name: sovereign-mode-transition-log
crates.description: Runtime mode-transition audit log — append-only record of every ExecutionMode switch (from, to, reason, operator signature, timestamp, trace_id). Enables the cockpit to render the day's mode timeline and the daemon to assert no illegal transitions occurred.

crates.name: sovereign-module-catalog
crates.description: M048 sovereign-os 10-module base catalog per M00800-M00812 + dump 14402-14812. Modules: BaseOS / ComputeFabric / SandboxFabric / Gateway / MemoryOS / WorkflowCompiler / EvalValue / ContinuityManager / Observability / LoraFoundry. KEY LINE per E0467 dump 14810: 'Every module is a controlled continuation of user intent across hardware, software, memory, and time' verbatim.

crates.name: sovereign-module-facets
crates.description: E0477 / M00828 — Continuity of Control: the uniform module interface. Every module MUST expose 6 facets (state / events / policy hooks / profile knobs / rollback story / learning signal). A descriptor + completeness validator so no module is unobservable, uncontrollable, or unrollback-able.

crates.name: sovereign-moe-gate
crates.description: M022 Cognitive Frame — system-level MoE gating: top-k expert selection with softmax-normalized weights over the selected experts, plus load-balance tracking (per-expert utilization + imbalance). The expert router, distinct from the hardware-role router (M075).

crates.name: sovereign-network-boundary
crates.description: E0124 / M00232 — Network Boundary: the 5-rung network-profile ladder (offline / package-registries / docs-web / arbitrary-web / authenticated-browser) and the per-branch ToolIntent (network_scope + reason), with the scope-within-allowed gate.

crates.name: sovereign-network-zerotrust
crates.description: Master spec §8 asymmetric Zero-Trust NIC segregation: the canonical two-NIC layout (mgmt Intel 2.5GbE VLAN 100 carries the default route; data Marvell 10GbE VLAN 200 MUST NOT) from profiles/sain-01.yaml hardware.network (R401-tested §8.1), plus a validator that flags a default route on the data plane as a Zero-Trust egress breach.

crates.name: sovereign-ngram-lm
crates.description: A trained statistical n-gram language model with add-k (Lidstone) smoothing and backoff to shorter contexts: counts token n-grams, gives a proper next-token probability distribution, and scores sequence perplexity. A cheap, deterministic LM for draft proposals, perplexity baselines, and detecting out-of-distribution text — distinct from neural-logit scoring.

crates.name: sovereign-ngram-speculative
crates.description: Prompt-lookup speculative drafting: propose the model's next tokens with no draft model by finding the most recent earlier occurrence of the last few tokens in the context and reusing what followed. Pairs with a verification step (accept the matching prefix) to speed up repetitive generation for free.

crates.name: sovereign-no-repeat-ngram
crates.description: No-repeat n-gram blocking for decoding: given the generated token history, computes the tokens that would complete a previously-seen n-gram, so they can be banned and the model cannot loop on exact phrases. A sequence-level generation control distinct from the sampler's token-level repetition penalty; pairs with the logit mask.

crates.name: sovereign-nvfp4-runtime
crates.description: M077 NVFP4 (E2M1 4-bit + E4M3 scale) pretraining + inference runtime per arXiv 2509.25149 + arXiv 2505.19115. 1x16 block allocator + RHT + 2D quantization + stochastic rounding + selective HP. Five recipe variants (NVFP4-S/M/L/XL/XXL). Targets Blackwell sm_120.

crates.name: sovereign-observability-events
crates.description: E0470 / M00818 + M00819 — the runtime observability event taxonomy (model_call … cost_event) + the 13-field span schema (profile/model/provider/hardware/tokens/latency/cost/risk/memory_refs/tool_refs/policy_result/branch_id/trace_id). OTel-aligned; branch_id/trace_id are the sovereign-trace-context types.

crates.name: sovereign-observability-fabric
crates.description: M048 Module 9 Observability Fabric — 9 sources + 6 questions answered per E0465 + M00811 + R08149-R08150 dump 14728-14744. Sources: OpenTelemetry traces / journald / DCGM / PSI / eBPF / ZFS events / test output / gateway logs / cost ledger.

crates.name: sovereign-online-regression
crates.description: Online simple linear regression: fit a least-squares line to a stream of (x, y) points incrementally, in constant memory, tracking slope, intercept, correlation, and R-squared without storing the data. Supports weighted and removable samples. For live trend estimation and extrapolation — latency vs load, throughput drift, cost vs tokens — updated one observation at a time.

crates.name: sovereign-p2-quantile
crates.description: Online quantile estimation with the P-squared algorithm: track a quantile (p50, p95, p99, …) over an unbounded stream in constant memory (five markers, parabolic interpolation), without storing the samples.
